    170.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I hope Zevlor rests in the softest, sweetest peace possible. He deserved more than he got.TG_CAMP_ZevlorsAppeal_FoundZevlor!TG_CAMP_ZevlorsAppeal_FoundZevlor

    441.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wow, so that was Mystra. Pretty spectacular stuff. But I think Gale was right not to agree to do her bidding, no questions asked.TG_LOW_Mystra_COM_NonCommitToReturnCrown!TG_LOW_Mystra_COM_NonCommitToReturnCrown

      171.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Pretty spectacular stuff. But I think you were right not to do her bidding, no questions asked.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4df74f9e-c4f6-05c0-81ea-6e8cf3566279Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha1bdc144g8885g4726gb958ga926b4ae732bText UUID: e691dbcc-e71b-483a-8eda-7c7133225d27Group ID: 738efa77-459b-593c-363e-da6ce420497cGroup Index: 1
      • +
        370.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I respect the gods, but they don't always understand what they're asking of us. Maybe immortality makes it hard to know what it's like to be one of us piggies.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9ef66df7-841e-e531-b767-11ac1ed25696Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he9f69673ge3eag49b1gab84g5a3170eaae19Text UUID: b06e9448-64b3-4af2-9af1-43a99c519979Timeline Phase Index: 294Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9ef66df7-841e-e531-b767-11ac1ed25696Timeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +

    • +
      594.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I trust you to know what you're doing. To know how far to go for Mystra. Just know that even without her - even without any of the gods - you're still pretty fantastic.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa1af0ec-b4ec-d91e-69e6-410675ef7eceSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h488b365eg8e69g4b39g8ed4g61fd5f6372ccText UUID: cb72104b-4cd9-4237-8e33-456ff7e43743Group ID: 5b6b3870-6654-d8ee-b75f-b8cee4b370aeGroup Index: 1
      • +

      9.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I trust him to know what he's doing. To know how far to go for Mystra. I just hope he knows he doesn't need her favour to be fucking fantastic.

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Gale
    Hope you know what you're doing, Gale. I'm no paladin for Mystra, but she probably has good reasons for forbidding Shadow Weave.
    h57e956cbg809dg4b92gb429gca9cf19eaeaf | a827d05e-f966-4972-a426-e789f354730a | stub

    Variant 2

    Gale's walking a thin line. Let's hope he doesn't fall headfirst over it - again.

    • +
      437.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let me transform. I'm... I'm not long for this world. I can feel it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ba8c77f0-9b2a-7d4c-2caa-7d255b30fc4cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha4ba0e70ga0d9g4496g9916g9bfdae4a2e6aText UUID: 78b62299-d309-4745-8389-b01c78042b81Timeline Phase Index: 266Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ba8c77f0-9b2a-7d4c-2caa-7d255b30fc4cTimeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: ba8c77f0-9b2a-7d4c-2caa-7d255b30fc4cGroup Index: 0
      • +
        457.Origin_Intro_Karlach: There'll be no risk in the Emperor controlling me - it's the perfect solution.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c281190c-ccc1-d8b7-69b9-dd9d8b7b2c94Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb52171ecgf2c7g4b95g94dfgcfae7f9ee764Text UUID: a5b610e9-a762-4b22-9401-2769c29de400Group ID: ba8c77f0-9b2a-7d4c-2caa-7d255b30fc4cGroup Index: 1
        • +
          334.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Say you agree. Please.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91e8ed17-311d-cb38-488f-e4b4feaec60aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1fd96955g67bbg4dadg82f6gbc3b368a74d1Text UUID: 0498fb9d-e0df-4579-8171-426a490dd0c4Group ID: ba8c77f0-9b2a-7d4c-2caa-7d255b30fc4cGroup Index: 2
          • +
            146.Player: This should be my sacrifice to make. Not yours.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 41fdde50-64ac-22ec-a44f-f40ab01cd920Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb89b24fbgfecfg4110ga6f3g317e35267677Text UUID: e8e582bb-66bf-4461-9b64-428058a625fcShow Once: True
            • +
              428.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Soldier, my heart feels like a live grenade - gonna blow any minute. You still have a life to live. I don't.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b558f88e-c346-e9e8-0fff-0a9ce62db045Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h024ad7d5g3aa4g4e40g80f0g8a7dcb6038a2Text UUID: 9fdb0199-fe69-4986-8f52-939ed9231748Timeline Phase Index: 224Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b558f88e-c346-e9e8-0fff-0a9ce62db045Timeline Phase Duration: 8.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                129.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let me do this for you. For me. Please, darling. I want to.ORI_State_WasPartneredWithKarlachKarlach

                  15.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If this is the end for me, let me be the motherfucker who saved the world.

                  • +
                    313.Player: All right. If this is what you really want, all I can say is thank you.END_IllithidOptions_State_AllowKarlachToTransform

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Global
                    • END_IllithidOptions_State_AllowKarlachToTransform {8c986d7e-74b4-4423-8dc6-6820702b1467} = True

                    • +
                      227.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You're very fucking welcome, soldier.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 613ddbdf-eea8-a138-f972-26390d6b104eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hd226e278g0326g4d20g942bgae0f29a82de3Text UUID: 5dea25ff-7c23-46c0-bc85-38700ee74b15Timeline Phase Index: 263Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 613ddbdf-eea8-a138-f972-26390d6b104eTimeline Phase Duration: 10.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 613ddbdf-eea8-a138-f972-26390d6b104eGroup Index: 0
                      • +
                        544.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If anyone was gonna be able to pull off a few tentacles, it was going to be me. Let's do this.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e5306a2c-8046-6965-4fd9-78d0ede89c92Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hd58efaf9ge7d5g42fcgad44ga3e85d3924d3Text UUID: a5d9caea-c25f-47b4-a94c-5a6fa81a5438Group ID: 613ddbdf-eea8-a138-f972-26390d6b104eGroup Index: 1

                  • +
                    480.Player: I can't, Karlach. I'm sorry. I want it to be me, not you.!END_IllithidOptions_State_AllowKarlachToTransform

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Global
                    • END_IllithidOptions_State_AllowKarlachToTransform {8c986d7e-74b4-4423-8dc6-6820702b1467} = False

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cc32e706-2f36-ddcf-3a06-8051f7a1d350Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0cfc8e04g5d63g4dd5g8283ge9772623f45dText UUID: 0631a617-8b25-4947-b167-3d6e0ff4acdeShow Once: True
                    • +
                      458.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I know you. I know you know your own mind. If this is what you want, then all I can say is give 'em Hell, soldier.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2e50072-4efa-aa99-980f-413fff6e9e64Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h125ea74cgf05dg4d53g9e50gd8d9c03face1Text UUID: eef91a91-502d-408a-abed-c4aefb39e96cTimeline Phase Index: 252Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c2e50072-4efa-aa99-980f-413fff6e9e64Timeline Phase Duration: 24.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: c2e50072-4efa-aa99-980f-413fff6e9e64Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        179.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I won't have to look at you much longer anyway, so I'm really getting the good end of the deal.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 505c071a-c0c3-60fe-48b0-14c077ec5f5fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h54d63069g0b15g4f05gb2c6g0a816989056bText UUID: 45843bfb-8664-4d8b-a5a8-2aae03b083b0Group ID: c2e50072-4efa-aa99-980f-413fff6e9e64Group Index: 1
                        • See Node 48 Jump to Node 546
                  • +
                    330.Player: No - none of us is turning into a mind flayer. If that means giving them the stones, then so be it.END_IllithidOptions_GD_State_AgreedGiveStonesEmperor

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Global
                    • END_IllithidOptions_GD_State_AgreedGiveStonesEmperor {7df060b3-5849-33bd-0faf-99daae5d26ba} = True

                    • +
                      237.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I trust you. Do what you think is right, and I'll stand by you.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 669595d8-f7c5-97a3-306f-3579156ead13Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h2071b983g17a6g400dgbc65g545beba1826eText UUID: e75c5859-aacd-43ce-b408-449adf3c1214Timeline Phase Index: 262Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 669595d8-f7c5-97a3-306f-3579156ead13Timeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 669595d8-f7c5-97a3-306f-3579156ead13Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        468.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But if you change your mind, just say so. I'm here. And I'm ready for whatever comes next.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c5fddc15-1a3b-f753-1772-b9cbf15d86bbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbc65a189g46eeg48d9g9715g2e0fdfdf7e47Text UUID: 031652d6-995f-474d-80b6-6a27d564a690Group ID: 669595d8-f7c5-97a3-306f-3579156ead13Group Index: 1
                        • See Node 48 Jump to Node 546
                  • +
                    142.Player: We should at least free Orpheus first. There might be another solution here.END_IllithidOptions_State_ArrivedWithOrphicHammer

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Global
                    • END_IllithidOptions_State_ArrivedWithOrphicHammer {a350e277-55a7-4e03-9c14-db154b6c682e} = True

                    • See Node 237 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) I trust you. Do what you think is right, and I'll stand by you.
          • +
            440.Player: If this is the end for you, you should go out as yourself, not a mind flayer.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bbc94be3-bd29-92e0-ad3a-107b55cef49eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc4eeb5acg2530g4093gbc9fg2c3272a873a6Text UUID: ad4472b7-e88c-4c2c-9b6c-b70a522490f3Show Once: True
            • +
              521.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'd rather be a mind flayer than have to watch you become one. You still get to live. Do it as you.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dddd08f9-eaf0-cc3f-3839-4c5bfc120b90Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h08cc95d4g07b5g4e47gbb61gd4839a918901Text UUID: a4ed8160-343b-43e8-a445-45abc8ffd21fTimeline Phase Index: 198Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dddd08f9-eaf0-cc3f-3839-4c5bfc120b90Timeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • See Node 129 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Let me do this for you. For me. Please, darling. I want to.
          • +
            607.Player: Are you sure this is what you want?

            • +
              120.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I've never been more sure of anything. This heart inside me is about to blow. Doesn't matter which body it takes out with it, right?

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 1b695211-54f9-09bc-fd17-52c2abd17176Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hdc353622gbf23g4814g8d22g0a9a5dd567dfText UUID: b0e870e7-c5b2-4c46-99e3-1f397f7263afTimeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b695211-54f9-09bc-fd17-52c2abd17176Timeline Phase Duration: 4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Root: True
    • See Node 437 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Let me transform. I'm... I'm not long for this world. I can feel it.
  • -
    483.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Another visit from the golden paladin. It said we'll get the answers we need about the tadpole if we infiltrate the cult.TG_Daisy_AfterDream2!TG_Daisy_AfterDream2

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
    • TG_Daisy_AfterDream2 {0653a714-e8f6-4ba3-8023-0d2677731116} = True
    settype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
    • TG_Daisy_AfterDream2 {0653a714-e8f6-4ba3-8023-0d2677731116} = False

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: cdb07e35-d38d-c3b1-345b-144afac9d1c9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h10bfc04ag43b5g4431ga4b6gf602ad89ecefText UUID: 2b012743-2f17-436b-9a86-d465f2b05270Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cdb07e35-d38d-c3b1-345b-144afac9d1c9Timeline Phase Duration: 9.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: True
    • +
      475.Player: We need to infiltrate Moonrise Towers, don't we? Exploring the tadpole's potential might make that easier.GOB_DrowCommander_Event_RaidersSortie

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • GOB_DrowCommander_Event_RaidersSortie {26816b01-2d64-b50c-3bf6-bffd7dc5f0b9} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cb03995d-64fd-9035-28db-76d269c98151Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9d20b891g98f7g4acaga0b1gb01d5eb2aea9Text UUID: 76acf307-ad14-4484-bce2-0abb9e3c5d37Show Once: True
      • +
        603.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's a fair point. I just don't want to take a short-term boon. I want to win this whole thing. To finish off the cult. To get this tadpole out. To stay sane the whole time.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ff48315f-239b-fc33-e155-c4c29ebe1653Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h67942e05g3ac7g4161gbd96gf262e94f07f6Text UUID: 088e11bf-f042-46fe-9fb2-ae32198700ccTimeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ff48315f-239b-fc33-e155-c4c29ebe1653Timeline Phase Duration: 13.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • •
          291.Jump to Node 546

          Metadata

          Node Type: JumpUUID: 82c30aa2-1e3e-de18-d3a8-d5ff9ed110c8Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
    • +
      100.Player: We'll need to be discreet to get in the heart of the cult. These powers might help.GOB_State_LeadersAreDead

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • GOB_State_LeadersAreDead {a1c5b01f-4b7f-47ab-82b0-d24d9c6d8bc6} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2b6c53ca-dd46-dd6d-9a56-cfaea8c3e54fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha7adf647g5e99g43d7g8963g7f890d75b088Text UUID: 6b38bedf-face-4681-9e77-3ed7b2f58165Show Once: True
      • See Node 603 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) It's a fair point. I just don't want to take a short-term boon. I want to win this whole thing. To finish off the cult. To get this tadpole out. To stay sane the whole time.
    • +
      489.Player: Then let's do just that.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d010de35-de74-4c2b-81d5-159febb51838Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4a571fadg0cbcg4ea9g8d1bgad1947163e2bText UUID: e47a0d9e-34b5-4d33-8ecc-8124c519fdefShow Once: True
      • +
        601.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Indeed.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fcca4b31-9c6e-71b5-1244-87096f56ab3cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1a5f9a44gc943g4e17g8fc3gee42765c2cc9Text UUID: f5e29c39-c5d0-4f91-b0bf-4b19605e4eb7Timeline Phase Index: 202Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fcca4b31-9c6e-71b5-1244-87096f56ab3cTimeline Phase Duration: 1.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 291 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      583.Player: I'm not sure - if we can use these tadpoles for good before extracting them, it could be worth it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f7190c1a-c139-8bfb-9565-52d0e9b12894Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6c0bde60g3427g4793gb755gbcbf24d233f0Text UUID: 2e9beec3-e5b8-496c-a770-e5e47e0b10c4Show Once: True
      • +
        592.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Could be. But I'm not sure either. And I'd rather rely on our wits and our weapons than a tadpole that could be up to anything in there.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f97a63b3-7fd5-ca24-23c2-b5ee94b3350eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1aedc7d0g8ce0g4e5cga73bgb60194c6d7dfText UUID: c0a15801-6d7f-495b-87dc-f9646c0f374fTimeline Phase Index: 205Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f97a63b3-7fd5-ca24-23c2-b5ee94b3350eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 291 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      123.Player: This feels like a trap. I don't think we should indulge this 'dream visitor' at all.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3703d00c-9940-f8f5-4c07-a9b280f0b6bcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd6001bf5g9cf1g44ccgb663g7effed9ee6fcText UUID: 6fd3dcc4-9543-4a37-8490-8e25466d51a5Show Once: True
      • +
        144.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Agreed. A bit of shiny armour doesn't impress me that much. I don't want to get taken in by a pretty offer and pay the price later on.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 41c58622-19c3-68ec-9da0-ed91880ed3d2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h5060a5cdgfebag4e68g9441gd0fc4955dca3Text UUID: e3267124-87f9-444a-aaea-40537cde9fd7Timeline Phase Index: 244Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 41c58622-19c3-68ec-9da0-ed91880ed3d2Timeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 291 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    402.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I had a wild dream last night. This beautiful entity came to me; promised to protect me. Told me the parasite in our heads could give us power.TG_Daisy_AfterDream1!TG_Daisy_AfterDream1

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: ad519528-22ce-01f7-b82a-4181431bbd69Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf073c80bg4928g4b2egb1bdgd03faad95a3dText UUID: 469db95b-5742-4d09-8036-16607dd24d71Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ad519528-22ce-01f7-b82a-4181431bbd69Timeline Phase Duration: 11.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: True
    • +
      465.Player: I had a similar dream. A side effect of the tadpole?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c57f44de-8a3a-7886-820a-20536912c76aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9dea895fg4454g4281gb21dg5fea166e6993Text UUID: a8025460-6864-4972-9205-7d93ca975a1eShow Once: True
      • +
        586.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Sounds like it. What did you make of it?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f756e8a0-78c6-3cc1-25f2-fd90e009bba8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hd7b993abg9e09g4c05gb69ag8601add01588Text UUID: 2534743b-dc08-4a5a-937c-42ac782b097aTimeline Phase Index: 208Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f756e8a0-78c6-3cc1-25f2-fd90e009bba8Timeline Phase Duration: 4.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          377.Player: I think it's some kind of psionic trick. I didn't believe a word it said.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a3aa47ab-2a8d-62e3-a82c-e943797b9257Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8dcd4edag4ffbg4905g9ee9gbf1f86d37aaeText UUID: 5c13c0fc-ebce-4476-b89b-f6a28f031f5dShow Once: True
          • +
            295.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Damn right. Thing's like a splinter - we just need to find a way to squeeze it out.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84140142-c3a9-0d39-ad16-832a39d56c18Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3c014548g4b18g4e9bg9d16g4be201081535Text UUID: 375cf226-1c98-43ee-86b0-01eca441e73eTimeline Phase Index: 243Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 84140142-c3a9-0d39-ad16-832a39d56c18Timeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •
              318.Jump to Node 546

              Metadata

              Node Type: JumpUUID: 8c9eabd2-508a-192b-e48e-c2cb83e73507Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
        • +
          72.Player: It was just a dream. Nothing more.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 20d8915a-d6f5-81fa-1afc-a64879930d1dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9ba4c8b0gdf7bg4f52g819dgfbdae061596dText UUID: 45ec1890-ad5e-4e42-a943-979e739f8ad3Show Once: True
          • +
            147.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Yeah. Right. I hope so, anyway.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42855815-4d01-a156-9494-cac331bb72aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf3786412g7d04g47c1gb11bgcf3d3f851a0dText UUID: 0ffecf62-948e-41af-a9b0-a27e32729594Timeline Phase Index: 245Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42855815-4d01-a156-9494-cac331bb72aaTimeline Phase Duration: 5.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • See Node 318 Jump to Node 546
        • +
          414.Player: If there's some kind of power to be unlocked from our affliction, I'm willing to try it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b0eeedce-b1f6-f1ab-750b-83be908ef814Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4a07e85eg2f0bg474eg9904g8a6bbcde59efText UUID: ba26c45a-0e38-429b-857c-4a91b8025796Show Once: True
          • +
            196.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Seems risky if you ask me. Couldn't help getting stuck with the tadpole, but taking favours from it? Spooky.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 55c81577-e83f-b28e-da18-3bd9015507beSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h09a01cb5g4bc2g4a26ga5c8gc70b83cc61d0Text UUID: 97fe8b5c-284b-4ad6-9831-55ac0a8dcae6Timeline Phase Index: 283Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 55c81577-e83f-b28e-da18-3bd9015507beTimeline Phase Duration: 9.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • See Node 318 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      404.Player: Sounds like a pretty intense dream.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ae4f5c94-1f6b-131b-d119-bedc3dc5227dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd4011a56g2c3eg4624ga327gaeb10b83c41aText UUID: 9d78bd37-3082-471d-914a-4702a9c91070Show Once: True
      • +
        115.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It was! And it seemed so... not real, but... not a dream, either.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3530aa9b-b9aa-a196-b366-9e4d813aa722Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hd3ed0b8fgaaf7g4e2bg96a5g0a74b212c559Text UUID: be7bfdaf-6cbc-4555-9608-2adf7066643eTimeline Phase Index: 285Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3530aa9b-b9aa-a196-b366-9e4d813aa722Timeline Phase Duration: 16.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3530aa9b-b9aa-a196-b366-9e4d813aa722Group Index: 0
        • +
          484.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Anyway, I told the entity to make tracks. I don't need anything else from this tadpole, thanks very much.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce07bfd5-ef88-5597-d01d-88b0d049329bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h938e63bfg13a3g4574g8fa6g8ca4e937c9d1Text UUID: ee506831-b8af-4c30-8852-42a608c5b476Group ID: 3530aa9b-b9aa-a196-b366-9e4d813aa722Group Index: 1
          • See Node 318 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      459.Player: I detest talking about dreams.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c356cdad-d1e8-023f-d21f-fb34bb9abb54Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hea790c8dg2df6g40aega3aegbe7a00322418Text UUID: ca717c63-39cb-4fb9-a75e-7fb4e101bac4Show Once: True
      • +
        8.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Have it your way, soldier.

        Metadata

    436.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Pity about Halsin. I was getting used to having an extra Strong around. He smelled nice, too. Like outside.TG_SCE_HalsinLeaves!TG_SCE_HalsinLeaves

    578.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Oh, Shadowheart. You may not remember what you've done. But I do.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_KilledParentsShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_KilledParents

    261.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Shadowheart may not be able to remember what she's done. But I'll never forget.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_KilledParents!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_KilledParents

    96.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's over, darling. You're free. Now you can start processing everything that's happened - believe me, it's plenty.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParentsShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParents

    • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    231.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm so glad Shadowheart's ordeal is over. It'll be a long time before she'll come to terms with all this. But at least, now, she can start. Free of Shar.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParents!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParents

    • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    606.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You know, for a while there, I wasn't sure you'd come back from Sharville. But look at you. You've done what few could ever do - created your own path.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParentsShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParents

    • +
      163.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Your folks must be so very, very proud of you.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a62e351-e3ec-98f6-3107-cc2a1ce0eb93Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h90f234ccgdb81g47d5gbf76g5bee6a341e90Text UUID: 124b6a3a-c255-4b62-a6f5-aa453466b74dGroup ID: ffada5f1-c451-06c0-fd16-878af207e38bGroup Index: 1
      • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    117.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You know, for a while there, I thought Shadowheart was going to stay stuck in Sharville. Maybe become the duke of the place.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParents!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParents

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
    • TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParents {62ef9fd5-f57c-43ff-a524-290051ce8add} = True
    settype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
    • TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharPath_SavedParents {62ef9fd5-f57c-43ff-a524-290051ce8add} = False

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 35f8ea76-8697-1dd5-821d-eeadee2546f6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h71678a22g6dd3g49cdga860g9b5c5145097cText UUID: 8c35c5ed-cbf9-423f-86d0-20958575b9feTimeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 35f8ea76-8697-1dd5-821d-eeadee2546f6Timeline Phase Duration: 18.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      385.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But she's done what so few are able for. She's created her own path. And now she's got her folks back, too. I love to see it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a68ce44c-e233-04de-34e0-340990ff4fa0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h88ff2c33gaf72g43c2ga7bfg023f3e0d3e78Text UUID: c5861ead-8306-4a7f-ae04-0c9862d83dd8Group ID: 35f8ea76-8697-1dd5-821d-eeadee2546f6Group Index: 1
      • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    401.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You're glowing. Finally, you have answers. Finally, you're free. Shar may still have access to you, but you're your own woman.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_SavedParentsShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_SavedParents

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    settype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
    • TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_SavedParents {44d31128-754f-4fc5-bc33-db89db198bb9} = False

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: ac88e3a6-8669-99ee-d334-92d4cc65382eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h871897bdg74f4g48c3g989cgf35a0334acd5Text UUID: b1f6e81a-18be-4d7f-937c-9d0e2e457d1cTimeline Phase Index: 88Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac88e3a6-8669-99ee-d334-92d4cc65382eTimeline Phase Duration: 16sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      559.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Your folks are absolutely precious, by the way. They must be so happy to have you back.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ea325f67-af27-781e-0159-6810b32cdf16Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h60f79de0g6d0cg4e81g905eg3a5d1f8d4c0bText UUID: 0a84080f-c335-4e39-8e67-044798915405Group ID: ac88e3a6-8669-99ee-d334-92d4cc65382eGroup Index: 1
      • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    554.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Shadowheart looks so happy, doesn't she? She seems... found. In a way she never seemed before, even when she was most devoted to Shar.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_SavedParents!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_SavedParents

    Flags and Tags

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: e88298f6-e997-6346-eeaf-f108f8653de3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h9dcee77eg166ag446eg9b61ga618d635a863Text UUID: 5026c21d-32a8-4949-87f1-12b834b32dcaTimeline Phase Index: 177Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e88298f6-e997-6346-eeaf-f108f8653de3Timeline Phase Duration: 16.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      174.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Her folks must be so glad to have her back. And to see who she's become.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4efa2ca3-1874-692f-9365-3eefa6de3977Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h57e1a51ag2dd1g4b96g9fa5g37984db930cbText UUID: df9d3585-542b-41e7-8627-4de708f32bc4Group ID: e88298f6-e997-6346-eeaf-f108f8653de3Group Index: 1
      • See Node 410 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    98.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Swit swoo, woman! Never thought I'd be so delighted at the sight of a forehead. You look amazing!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NewHairShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NewHair

    Flags and Tags

    543.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods, Shadowheart looks like a stack of gold! Never thought I could get so excited about someone's forehead, but here we are.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NewHair!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NewHair

    • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    507.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hey, Shads. I know you've just heard a lot of pretty shocking stuff. I can't pretend to know how you're feeling, but I want you to know I'm beside you.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NightsongMeetingShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NightsongMeeting

    Flags and Tags

    • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    398.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Poor Shadowheart. She's been jerked around so much. I want to believe the gods keep this world balanced, but sometimes... sometimes I wonder.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NightsongMeeting!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_NightsongMeeting

    Flags and Tags

  • -
    140.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Are you all right? Of course you're not all right.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharWrathShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharWrath

    Flags and Tags

    • +
      49.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, I've got you. If you need a rest, lean on me. If you need a hand, take mine. If you need an ear, I've got two. Whatever you need.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1afd1c0d-59e7-b00d-3973-5859c561a6a1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h768b6abeg0fa7g40adgb33eg364962c08e51Text UUID: ca504e87-7889-45ef-8f93-a91b733f89bcGroup ID: 3fca295f-63e1-1b4d-285a-132fd0bc5a84Group Index: 1
      • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    341.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Tsk. I hate seeing Shadowheart suffer like this. All for doing the right thing.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharWrath!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SharWrath

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 933ede4f-a277-c40f-5b2d-3f9d96a1ae11Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he4b9ae6bgd0aag4190gbfb8g3b6fa759d02aText UUID: 6e93b064-6213-4c57-bc0b-4d4d284ddd1aTimeline Phase Index: 7Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 933ede4f-a277-c40f-5b2d-3f9d96a1ae11Timeline Phase Duration: 20.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      327.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's up to us to look after her now. If she needs a rest, we carry her. If she needs a hand, she has ours. If she needs ears, we've got four between us. Whatever she needs.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8fb73ea4-3878-6bfe-b3c8-c34356933ff6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hda12db0bg33a1g4d3ega107g81d55398935cText UUID: 33f29ff6-e9c5-4b05-b927-91bc41ef0177Group ID: 933ede4f-a277-c40f-5b2d-3f9d96a1ae11Group Index: 1
      • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    257.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Ketheric's waiting for us. Can only imagine the beating that angel is preparing for him.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SparedNightsongShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_SparedNightsong

    Flags and Tags

    • +
      93.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Thanks to your good sense, we have a chance at beating him. I know it wasn't easy, going your own way - it never is. You're some woman, Shadowheart.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2951aca1-a38a-8f35-df16-26f5b7a1b4d0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h23f58345g446eg44e6ga69egda9bad2bfc8aText UUID: 4a751922-4d3f-4bc5-975b-ef86d528e0e5Group ID: 73b937a1-a580-8132-a53c-c7b5ea5d4449Group Index: 1
      • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -

      215.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Thanks to Shadowheart's good sense, we've got a chance at beating him.

  • -
    78.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You've really done it now, Shadowheart. I hope you know what the fuck you're getting yourself into.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_KilledNightsongShadowheart!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_KilledNightsong

      112.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Killing a restrained enemy - one who never did shit to you? That's just low. Even for a Sharran.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 33cc8886-5090-fd08-446c-66e248475662Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbe2681d9gc371g489egb63egdaef9582a47cText UUID: e20eb4d9-98be-40a3-8308-a520c363ce29Timeline Phase Index: 288Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 33cc8886-5090-fd08-446c-66e248475662Timeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • See Node 403 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    472.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Shadowheart's really done it now. She's crossed a line she can never un-cross.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_KilledNightsong!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_KilledNightsong

    14.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Damn. Bye-bye, Shadowheart. Hate to see her go, but I'm also not sure bringing her into a Sharran temple would've been the best idea for us. Or her.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_TempleLeftParty!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_TempleLeftParty

    451.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Just when I think I can't respect Jaheira any more. She's got a backup plan for if we fuck things up. Smart.TG_ORI_Jaheira_KeptScroll!TG_ORI_Jaheira_KeptScroll

    • +
      526.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let's hope she doesn't need to use it. Not everyone wants to live forever.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dea97acc-a915-f007-f135-c6491f99d13aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he129c2fcg383eg4cf7g9955g31e65155b46fText UUID: dde4db46-fe0b-4e61-8148-7c7c6daf1868Group ID: c0a75467-a94e-ff17-6109-21d8dafe4d5cGroup Index: 1

  • -
    158.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Just when I think I can't respect Jaheira any more, she hits me with a grenade right to the heart.TG_ORI_Jaheira_BurnedScroll!TG_ORI_Jaheira_BurnedScroll

    Flags and Tags

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 48fba4b3-694b-d09d-a6d7-e267f817a8f9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h39839b7dgddfdg4c3ag9c62g08f8d183dc64Text UUID: 6cfa24e3-2925-47bd-889d-7a3c0ef7ec21Timeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 48fba4b3-694b-d09d-a6d7-e267f817a8f9Timeline Phase Duration: 25sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      206.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I couldn't agree with her more. There's more to life than... than time. It isn't about how long you're here. It's about what you do with whatever time you've got.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5804b583-7c6b-4048-8c9a-5e5bc5e7022eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3edb3499gffe5g403dgabdbgece7731b42f9Text UUID: 080b518d-b3d9-4323-8fc6-ef47cf10e1e3Group ID: 48fba4b3-694b-d09d-a6d7-e267f817a8f9Group Index: 1
      • +
        173.Origin_Intro_Karlach: And Jaheira? Well, I don't think anyone's spent their hours better than her.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ef9f1a1-c12f-577d-0c30-f1942ff8eeb2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h40c7d303g032eg440dg8c72g7fab5add8fa4Text UUID: 61fb1e57-4241-420f-886e-000d1a4505c6Group ID: 48fba4b3-694b-d09d-a6d7-e267f817a8f9Group Index: 2
        • See Node 18 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    431.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Ugh, that guy makes my skin crawl. So - what's the plan? Do we chase him out of town, or skip straight to skull-cracking?!GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedTG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlan!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlan

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: b628be52-5aa1-a575-c90a-00a83aa90703Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h98c16159g0dccg418egb20bg0ec501cf1970Text UUID: c81bd69e-1baf-4e23-92c9-91588f28e53cTimeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b628be52-5aa1-a575-c90a-00a83aa90703Timeline Phase Duration: 11.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: True
    • +
      309.Player: Dame Aylin should deal with him. It's her he's after.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 88fb01ae-965d-82bc-78ac-5cd613bbcfaeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5dda13d9g6781g4aefgb4abga9664238c605Text UUID: 6f5bb901-a966-4619-b704-fd0e3f150bd2Show Once: True
      • +
        310.Origin_Intro_Karlach: All right, all right, fair enough. But ooh, can I watch?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8976e2ee-7a8a-caa7-a966-ceea8af32381Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha748026ag9486g48abgb9fdg260f9af3fbd6Text UUID: 692a8e21-993d-4e6e-b34b-fe4504d0e610Timeline Phase Index: 238Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8976e2ee-7a8a-caa7-a966-ceea8af32381Timeline Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 18 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      134.Player: What's got you so bloodthirsty?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3e2bc07f-97f8-1894-b705-48ca67dc8c0eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h17f0b75fgeb8ag45e0gb9eeg888971e9c3daText UUID: ffc57309-c5c8-492d-ad8d-b939f6a29ea8Show Once: True
      • +
        148.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm not bloodthirsty. I'm dangerous creep-thirsty. This guy is terrible news. I say we stop him before he hurts anyone.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42c9849d-2132-431f-03a6-f1e6d27e8af4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h83e115a2g4047g43d7g8fa2g9a129afe18aaText UUID: 9031d6fa-6d43-47e2-82f4-7aa2e4cb1672Timeline Phase Index: 246Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42c9849d-2132-431f-03a6-f1e6d27e8af4Timeline Phase Duration: 10sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          124.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Better yet: Let Dame Aylin do it. She deserves to look him in the eye before she ends him.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38422bf4-5dc3-829e-a33e-211c988cb866Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h29f76307gb53eg4910g9339g1b62fb1a789eText UUID: e80ee7a8-f4c6-4744-9b00-b9b0e89c8f23Timeline Phase Index: 264Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 38422bf4-5dc3-829e-a33e-211c988cb866Timeline Phase Duration: 7.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 18 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      568.Player: We'll play it easy, for now. No sense spoiling for a fight we can avoid.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: edb963ae-8689-b52a-7aec-81414586850dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he1055784g3cc9g4a1fgb3dcg5503a9ff50b2Text UUID: 7eab959a-1ae8-4861-9618-3b6e4878bd82Show Once: True
      • +
        160.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Says you. Me, I'd love nothing more than to throat slam that creep.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4969dd98-7b2b-6cba-d649-0eab53d4fd38Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hca1f8776g7c39g4b23g84f9g2eee5de7dcc8Text UUID: 892be11b-170a-4cdb-9b29-5aad8ff26af5Timeline Phase Index: 255Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4969dd98-7b2b-6cba-d649-0eab53d4fd38Timeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • See Node 124 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Better yet: Let Dame Aylin do it. She deserves to look him in the eye before she ends him.
  • -
    487.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That guy's a walking wound. He thinks Dame Aylin will fix whatever's broken in him. And he'll good as kill her to do it.GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedTG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlan!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlan

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: cf72b329-d840-2374-8709-60fd3964ce91Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h12689f48g0ff7g4377gabe3g206eb43627eeText UUID: 9b7a3919-7cb0-4c89-bd52-e316e7b88c85Timeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cf72b329-d840-2374-8709-60fd3964ce91Timeline Phase Duration: 14.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      345.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I say we don't let Aylin anywhere near this guy. It won't do either of them any good.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9688767d-03a9-7868-9470-9a0a5b72f452Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hc5500e2bgdcb1g44b6gb161g3de6180b4beeText UUID: e0951175-4936-4d69-97b6-b0215e3ece66Group ID: cf72b329-d840-2374-8709-60fd3964ce91Group Index: 1
      • +
        328.Player: Lorroakan won't stop coming after her. We need to stop him - permanently.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8ff82ff9-2d11-d3b4-6110-9b5871710067Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1ca260f8g6910g4670ga8e2g23b5f36c6f85Text UUID: f004e83c-0832-4c74-8071-f65262cb98c8Show Once: True
        • +
          527.Origin_Intro_Karlach: She can handle whatever that prick throws at her. Eventually he'll get bored. Maybe even move on to something more productive.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: decf46de-e142-b3b6-f86e-0eab2f93a55eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf940a3e1ge4d8g4a55g8e06g021cada71e86Text UUID: 175ec4ab-02b4-4fbb-8e25-8b7c952cbe26Timeline Phase Index: 225Timeline Dialog Node UUID: decf46de-e142-b3b6-f86e-0eab2f93a55eTimeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            570.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Is that wishful thinking?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef2da42f-5ded-32df-6e4d-d391416ee3bdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h39dbfd23g67c3g4679g99b4g36936ba7cd69Text UUID: 99cec242-0b3f-4606-a287-c4d284788230Timeline Phase Index: 212Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef2da42f-5ded-32df-6e4d-d391416ee3bdTimeline Phase Duration: 3.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              260.Player: Maybe. Maybe not. It's for Dame Aylin to decide.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7543b6fd-a597-98bc-1ffc-b4109e7e077bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcdfb7e1agd278g4ddagb282g81465adfa6e1Text UUID: 2e6e3d00-1164-4961-a834-b9848aaf7fb6Show Once: True
              • +
                467.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Fair enough. I only wish she'd have a bit of peace, after all the shit she's been through.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c5aeb8d9-d6cf-6980-9cbc-d2be68ba2e75Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h68c67a49g3edeg4d18g8498g0c70b68a3e6bText UUID: 7e724b72-3693-4b50-870d-ccb044aee136Timeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c5aeb8d9-d6cf-6980-9cbc-d2be68ba2e75Timeline Phase Duration: 6.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • •
                  306.Jump to Node 546

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 87f5e0d8-9c2b-3bfd-5db7-54bb25f3fc07Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
            • +
              76.Player: I think so. A man like Lorroakan doesn't simply lose interest in immortality.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 221fafc6-80c8-1d53-7b58-f11a6872843eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h05f65882g9048g4052gb72fg551fb40622ccText UUID: bbca6589-261b-44b9-9751-e2cd6bffd770Show Once: True
              • +
                187.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You know, I'm getting really tired of big-headed fools and their godsdamned schemes. Don't they ever go on holiday?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5257aa3a-4fc6-9ca1-706c-ab0d91c606d2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h401e2b6eg0ad7g43bbga4f6geaa6953bd53cText UUID: 3e6efecb-be62-45aa-a86f-a07c4a5cef74Timeline Phase Index: 200Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5257aa3a-4fc6-9ca1-706c-ab0d91c606d2Timeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5257aa3a-4fc6-9ca1-706c-ab0d91c606d2Group Index: 0
                • +
                  3.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But fair enough. It's Dame Aylin's decision how she wants to deal with Lorroakan. I just wish she'd have a bit of peace after all she's been through.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0287a9d2-4423-f6d7-bf71-bf869c05f2f4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h8bd8da81g58b9g4caega3c5g91ee8cf3a5ccText UUID: bb7a7da1-a97f-4325-bc0f-652bc3911a50Group ID: 5257aa3a-4fc6-9ca1-706c-ab0d91c606d2Group Index: 1
                  • See Node 306 Jump to Node 546
            • +
              513.Player: No. Most people want it all, until they have to work to get it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: daf2df13-5acc-8301-ceb7-926824e1924cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h010e000bgaf70g4dd5g9591g80828bd91507Text UUID: 8ffd35a5-4f53-4753-92b9-6f9242722f10Show Once: True
              • +
                397.Origin_Intro_Karlach: My thinking exactly. This weasel's got nothing on our demi-god. Nothing at all.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ab996018-d85b-95bc-4222-9b1e1dec1d23Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h9c231decg1b58g4df6gbe6fg3b4f142c7fd4Text UUID: 6bdf332c-10e1-4b76-aaa5-e23685ca18ffTimeline Phase Index: 232Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ab996018-d85b-95bc-4222-9b1e1dec1d23Timeline Phase Duration: 7.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • See Node 306 Jump to Node 546
      • +
        4.Player: We'll let Aylin deal with him in her own way.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 02e0d8cd-45ac-9680-869c-593832bc4047Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0f8c5631gb579g40edgaffdgb9f66a36d156Text UUID: 71264408-8857-4a65-9fa7-f7f9b444b2e3Show Once: True
        • +
          50.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I guess that's her right. I've no doubt she can handle him. I just... well, there's a darkness in her. A pain I recognise.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b0a7b7a-60c3-b780-86cf-d432b95c5252Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h937fcf86gae7fg4a0cg9c90g3684e0697801Text UUID: 1b90ddcf-ad60-4f81-9f68-ee216b5edc56Timeline Phase Index: 217Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b0a7b7a-60c3-b780-86cf-d432b95c5252Timeline Phase Duration: 19.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 1b0a7b7a-60c3-b780-86cf-d432b95c5252Group Index: 0
          • +
            329.Origin_Intro_Karlach: For now, she's bigger than it is. But things grow when you feed 'em. That's all.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 90a64714-f2a7-c618-c821-0d957ccddbb1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h79db664ag430ag4107g9df2gf2c00b969906Text UUID: 664c77c2-895d-4ac5-9b2d-e6ffde6fc51aGroup ID: 1b0a7b7a-60c3-b780-86cf-d432b95c5252Group Index: 1
            • •

      • +
        24.Player: Agreed. It's a risk we don't need to take.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0e20e2fa-7437-a8e2-60c8-640f0d446cb5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h58d514c0g2ea0g42f4g8996gb2e9e13ea671Text UUID: 202b4e02-8607-4c02-b753-5981cbef74fbShow Once: True
        • +
          82.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Exactly. And anyway, he'll see this is a losing gambit eventually. Maybe take up something more interesting, like darts.

          Metadata

    • +
      110.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I for one am delighted Lorroakan got what was coming to him.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 332a0538-5df0-4fa8-b71b-86b755e91160Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hce2be9aag3274g4028gb493g3a81d582435bText UUID: bb763f80-2941-45dc-a894-7a7f28c28acaGroup ID: 8a4c7703-27c6-4f16-a3d6-89b9f5e3f4ccGroup Index: 1
      • +
        591.Player: As am I. But Dame Aylin has endured a great deal; she must be tired of killing evil-doers.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f8f99a06-b3dd-470d-86aa-63aea7bfedf0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8c52cdd5g742cg472dg8224g425e7a21e8b8Text UUID: ff29d194-b014-4cfc-b4dd-88d946950f6bShow Once: True
        • +
          565.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I don't know. Isn't that what a paladin of Selûne does?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ecef7080-8d42-46c3-a449-7e102d11629dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h49607c7bg3801g4c20gbc2bgfce1c9b69c4cText UUID: c0138a36-6d85-47c9-ac87-36a3e5cd4623Timeline Phase Index: 297Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ecef7080-8d42-46c3-a449-7e102d11629dTimeline Phase Duration: 14.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: ecef7080-8d42-46c3-a449-7e102d11629dGroup Index: 0
          • •
            211.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hope that good old Aylin holy fervour returns to her soon. I don't like to see her looking so... lost. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 58c66a0c-2b02-4cbf-be6b-fd815529d086Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb14f1f05g3d95g49cega5a6ga2f36e2aca19Text UUID: b1903a1b-a27f-4113-a528-8a47dac0adb5End Node: TrueGroup ID: ecef7080-8d42-46c3-a449-7e102d11629dGroup Index: 1
      • +
        452.Player: Perhaps revenge isn't as sweet as it seems.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c0d816c2-57e9-46fa-af69-2fc2ecdf4c89Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6bc656a2gf238g45b7g94cega7308395679fText UUID: ba379f16-074e-46a6-812c-8fe730f19ed5Show Once: True
        • +
          490.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Pff. Believe me, I plan to revel mightily once I've finished with Gortash.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d050bbbc-a3f1-4a79-97a0-18783e7044ceSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h255cb66egfb5ag49eeg9065g2ad6df19c4dbText UUID: 9dbe4dc4-8061-4e14-8886-14b374230a49Timeline Phase Index: 309Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d050bbbc-a3f1-4a79-97a0-18783e7044ceTimeline Phase Duration: 14.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: d050bbbc-a3f1-4a79-97a0-18783e7044ceGroup Index: 0
          • •
            386.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hopefully Dame Aylin will be back to herself by then, so she can congratulate me on a murtherer well-broken. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a6c2c82b-b6ad-4e20-b6df-9385fe1f082fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hfa5a8bddgbe1bg49b9gb2c4g0b2ae61fdc22Text UUID: c4673e4c-d45f-4e66-ac59-082ba682738aEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: d050bbbc-a3f1-4a79-97a0-18783e7044ceGroup Index: 1
      • +
        302.Player: She went too far. There's something dark in her - and it's growing.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 85c5e064-8585-41e1-bb07-8440c1d186a5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7b30fb73g8fc7g458cg96a3g96cca1e68c1fText UUID: 261e904e-f33c-414a-b0f2-5bdb286286f6Show Once: True
        • +
          65.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Don't mistake justice for something worse. Aylin has every right to be angry - furious even.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f97e556-d2ff-43af-8914-9a0a11cb543fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h90fecd17ga0cbg4aadg8366gb48fb6f29cb3Text UUID: 465f66ca-9055-402b-8a44-59ee5cf52effTimeline Phase Index: 311Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1f97e556-d2ff-43af-8914-9a0a11cb543fTimeline Phase Duration: 17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 1f97e556-d2ff-43af-8914-9a0a11cb543fGroup Index: 0
          • •
            387.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm glad to see her letting it out - she deserves that much. She'll cheer up. Probably just tired, like she said. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a70a5e97-2756-4b0d-a598-601833f33334Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb258464eg3f18g40a3gb984gbbab060a855aText UUID: bbafb610-f3cf-426c-b643-9467524fa98cEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 1f97e556-d2ff-43af-8914-9a0a11cb543fGroup Index: 1
  • -
    596.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Tsk. I was afraid of this.GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedTG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_NSSmashedLorroakan!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_NSSmashedLorroakan

    Flags and Tags

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: fa9cf777-aca3-4203-9e2f-8cf8d29549beSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha9deb2cegb600g4e85g9ddfg0e08ded46836Text UUID: b33ebbb7-c92f-47bb-95e3-46fc06d0661cTimeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fa9cf777-aca3-4203-9e2f-8cf8d29549beTimeline Phase Duration: 13.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      485.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Revenge sounds so sweet until you've taken it. Then all you have is... no one left to blame.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce8ab891-b6ee-45c4-8700-3a39eff2fb39Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hca5003b9gf138g404fgae04g9efd0338c238Text UUID: b6c82c33-187f-4505-8048-ea4988cbc98aGroup ID: fa9cf777-aca3-4203-9e2f-8cf8d29549beGroup Index: 1
      • +
        520.Player: Dame Aylin has endured a great deal; she must be tired of killing evil-doers.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ddd4cdb9-6e74-4323-8fe9-581b31119feaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1760ac50g7ab0g43e7g9f33g67f9d1304b12Text UUID: a3cfebc1-dc04-48bb-a5aa-3a2208462a54Show Once: True
        • +
          598.Origin_Intro_Karlach: She's more than tired. Something's happening inside her. And who could blame her, after what she's endured.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb16238a-be6b-4c2a-95f3-37d0fb4e4ed1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3db8d100g4144g49e7gb146gb63a1e3e7807Text UUID: d5dd2516-a83c-4f91-a928-43ebc4ea79bcTimeline Phase Index: 204Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fb16238a-be6b-4c2a-95f3-37d0fb4e4ed1Timeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • •
            456.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I just hope Aylin's as wise enough to sort it out before it sorts her. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c271f0e4-e8f2-425f-b764-6f7099eba94aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h650197b1g9b3bg4bf2g9574g1847a07f555fText UUID: efccc473-9f84-4463-91a4-e8e315f1cd0fTimeline Phase Index: 313Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c271f0e4-e8f2-425f-b764-6f7099eba94aTimeline Phase Duration: 4.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
      • +
        210.Player: Something tells me Dame Aylin will find someone else to blame. And then another.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 58a7327d-58ab-4da1-a8c9-25819f1efbb7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h76565d1bg5144g4916ga4c5g1a51d8ed06adText UUID: 9c6e748d-b1c9-4f34-8cc1-ee3b6b4dbc6cShow Once: True
        • •
          477.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods help whoever she trains her sword on next. But I hope it stays sheathed for a while yet. For her sake. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb383cd4-bd4b-4c13-8903-09712d614522Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha7f3803dgf8b5g400fga4b4gfabbf2ead3b7Text UUID: dbf6e6b8-6437-4090-b6f9-9d93f698f834Timeline Phase Index: 307Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cb383cd4-bd4b-4c13-8903-09712d614522Timeline Phase Duration: 9.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
      • +
        53.Player: Are you talking about Dame Aylin or yourself?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1be1dea1-8bf4-4e69-8daf-bec9fad534f9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb06fdab2g7a13g4c61gac41gfa1f8f302e4dText UUID: 5d4a22e7-916d-4869-8985-c58c02f648efShow Once: True
        • +
          242.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Us strongs understand each other. Especially in the empty minutes after a fight you didn't ask for. Or maybe shouldn't have.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6951c082-1005-47e1-8704-95b1f427a2c9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6f6f0ffdg029bg473bg9d0dge804de854e5dText UUID: 5bd39d58-44dc-4b49-8e50-68dfbfe0dd93Timeline Phase Index: 261Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6951c082-1005-47e1-8704-95b1f427a2c9Timeline Phase Duration: 8.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 6951c082-1005-47e1-8704-95b1f427a2c9Group Index: 0
          • +

    340.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well done getting that creep off Dame Aylin's tail. The last thing she needs is more trouble dogging her heels.TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_PlayersConvincedNSIsDead!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_PlayersConvincedNSIsDead

    • +
      580.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Then again, she may want to know exactly who's been offering a small fortune for her capture. She may have some thoughts about that.GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeated

    79.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Minthara's pregnant. A new life, a little one, sprung from all this fuckin' chaos.TG_ORI_Minthara_TalkedAboutPregnancy!TG_ORI_Minthara_TalkedAboutPregnancy

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 23b2baf7-0c68-35c9-7dba-7e9a6c60e72aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he31bd610ga2bcg4488g8b91gab51948cffb8Text UUID: 251618a8-8433-46c8-8d45-d21bec39b6caTimeline Phase Index: 172Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 23b2baf7-0c68-35c9-7dba-7e9a6c60e72aTimeline Phase Duration: 19.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      358.Origin_Intro_Karlach: All the more reason to put this place to rights. Give Little Minthy every chance of a normal life. And hey - if you're in the market for godmothers, I have availability from now 'til the rest of my life.

      Text

      All the more reason to put this place to rights. Give Little Minthy every chance of a normal life. And hey - if you're in the market for godmothers, I have availability from now 'til the rest of my life.
      h17d7f94cg7df8g4a76gbb51gee4bf60c7e43 | b9bafc59-d6af-4bc1-bfec-5584a656033c | stub

      Metadata

  • -
    143.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well, Astarion. I stood by you and defeated the last obstacle to your reign as the vampire lord of Baldur's Gate.TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarVampireLordDefeatedGurAstarion!TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarVampireLordDefeatedGur

    • +
      197.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Something tells me I might regret this. I'm counting on you to prove me wrong.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5668f6b1-0666-175f-2de1-6ed08b3262eeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h12d7993dg8001g4028gb97fgc5182c1e053bText UUID: d5cb9d87-bb64-4cc5-8e30-88e4158df0d7Group ID: 414430c2-b56d-68fa-2d76-dbeaf98fefb0Group Index: 1
      • See Node 348 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    450.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well. We stood by Astarion and defeated the last obstacle to his reign as the vampire lord of Baldur's Gate.TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarVampireLordDefeatedGur!TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarVampireLordDefeatedGur

      184.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Sometimes I really question my own decision-making.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 51d5d38a-76c1-bcf3-16d2-e855848808dfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h8304d781g0528g47a6gab82g2453bfac0d85Text UUID: 8baeb990-afc0-45a8-bbbc-5b2becd29d23Group ID: c00abb2e-a2b0-b5d3-5fb2-0711400a8277Group Index: 1
      • See Node 348 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    433.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Halsin is one hench elf. I'm impressed - and glad he's on our side.TG_SCL_HalsinRecruited!TG_SCL_HalsinRecruited

    500.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Raphael must be raging we didn't take his deal. Luckily, his desperation made him careless.TG_WYR_RaphaelTango_DealRefused!TG_WYR_RaphaelTango_DealRefused

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: d392daa3-847f-87cb-a452-27fdf73e5c84Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h554b9d2bg00c3g4019ga411g7d2cd9fb9268Text UUID: aa37d7a3-1ef3-419a-8c24-1d20c9f0b32bTimeline Phase Index: 3Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d392daa3-847f-87cb-a452-27fdf73e5c84Timeline Phase Duration: 20sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      312.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Did you hear what he said? The hammer's in his House of Hope. If we wanted, we could steal it right out from under his nose.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 89cce609-6196-da70-9356-4bf87a397ae2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h835b0268g123cg42e1g88cdg9ccefa5f7608Text UUID: 9e747d3f-de68-4c18-a36d-b92535b63328Group ID: d392daa3-847f-87cb-a452-27fdf73e5c84Group Index: 1
      • +
        418.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Granted, it wouldn't be easy. Devils guard their treasure by especially lethal means.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b36b7d88-0fd1-fbe1-833e-f491a4bc2cb6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h8b6e4e1ag5dfcg4c64ga915ga5e6c1400d7cText UUID: 88a1ab0b-8270-4b64-8e85-bcd0835b827fGroup ID: d392daa3-847f-87cb-a452-27fdf73e5c84Group Index: 2
        • +
          130.Player: What do you suggest?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3c1369bf-a2b7-eccd-680a-1dd37a6a110bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9fb0ba05ge53eg4dbdg96aeg3df72ca5df9cText UUID: 1ad4014c-0501-434d-9c9b-8c4b60ad6f37Show Once: True
          • +
            395.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We would need to find a diabolist. One worth their salt should be able to get us into that devil's lair.!LOW_Helsik_Know_RevealedAsDiabolist

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global
            • LOW_Helsik_Know_RevealedAsDiabolist {89e8e322-a263-2b13-d6c3-0e44a555a385} = False

            • +
              532.Origin_Intro_Karlach: One last trip to Avernus. At least it'd be for a good reason, right?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e07cdce9-19ac-13eb-6116-208f0ad0dec6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf1840ea4g7ea6g4437g8886gac74932ae41eText UUID: 814cffac-af8e-4288-9f82-f06c20866db1Timeline Phase Index: 227Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e07cdce9-19ac-13eb-6116-208f0ad0dec6Timeline Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                Metadata

            567.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We'd need to talk to Helsik. She'd know how to get into that devil's lair, if she's worth her salt.LOW_Helsik_Know_RevealedAsDiabolist

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global

            • See Node 532 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) One last trip to Avernus. At least it'd be for a good reason, right?
        • +
          308.Player: Do we even need the hammer?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 88f1cabd-8cdb-c71b-57da-c1051da79375Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h62a5a1a0gfeacg45e9g9e9fg3ad192da25f7Text UUID: 88749e9d-5f04-4f60-b6b7-b7464da7cb02Show Once: True
          • +
            263.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Maybe not. I wouldn't exactly relish heading into a devil's lair looking for it. But if you think it'll help us stop the Netherbain, I'll do anything.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 75c2f6a4-84e5-54fa-8f6b-b90849e75213Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6a3e950bgbd5cg4b6bg976cgab432f455b7eText UUID: d7cd2090-009a-4c32-bcd2-b572b0705605Timeline Phase Index: 233Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 75c2f6a4-84e5-54fa-8f6b-b90849e75213Timeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

          156.Player: I don't like facing Raphael here in the city. I'm sure as hell not heading into his lair.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 461b5022-4417-63ab-eded-f69aff21e63aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7ccc9b42g247dg4f7egb5c0g653692080cbfText UUID: 9b9d5c28-a24a-4898-86e4-46b50eebb5d3Show Once: True
          • +
            87.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Believe me, I don't relish the thought either. But we need to assess all our options. What matters most is defeating the brain and saving the city.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 26f22224-10f3-0a15-ec82-a60c303fc8f6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf964bc36g5657g43fag9b72gc6589a292ae6Text UUID: c1cdf005-6fd3-4241-8614-f91ef8ce220fTimeline Phase Index: 206Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 26f22224-10f3-0a15-ec82-a60c303fc8f6Timeline Phase Duration: 14.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 26f22224-10f3-0a15-ec82-a60c303fc8f6Group Index: 0
            • +

  • -
    469.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Lae'zel, you know I admire that faithful heart of yours. But sometimes, being loyal to the wrong person can come back to bite you - hard. I hope this isn't one of those times.TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitAcceptedMissionLae'zel!TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitAcceptedMission

    363.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So we're going to meet Voss in the city, are we? Set the tenant of the Prism free? This is all very... I don't know. I like a good caper, but I'd long for a tiny bit of status quo now and again.TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationOrpheusOutcome!TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationOrpheusOutcome

    Text

    So we're going to meet Voss in the city, are we? Set the tenant of the Prism free? This is all very... I don't know. I like a good caper, but I'd long for a tiny bit of status quo now and again.
    h0c6b157bg78b9g4efegab58g1768c4abcf41 | aa25e746-c533-4fc5-a9e4-28c6facf52e7 | stub

    519.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Kith'rak Voss didn't know who he was dealing with, did he?     311.Origin_Intro_Karlach: No one more loyal than our Lae'zel. If Voss had known that, he never would have come here throwing salt on Vlaakith's name.TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationVlaakithOutcome!TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationVlaakithOutcome

      350.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I don't want Zariel to have you. I can't stand it. But... it's done, isn't it?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9783e67e-7c9d-5d83-f86a-05eed3d6f7daSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hdea395eagc313g4a47g861dgf448fbb320aeText UUID: 68faffd4-54f1-4d2d-b034-3ae257fd4d13Group ID: 8f84d7f0-e871-032a-89e1-bc2d2ccfe8ceGroup Index: 1
      • +
        43.Player: It is, I'm afraid. I stand by my choice.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 18cbfad9-e20e-0862-5143-2a22a3cdb1d1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6f0bbc8dg3d4dg4388ga48dg499548573569Text UUID: 4604e873-2844-4649-9f3a-c228252bbfd8Show Once: True
        • +
          70.Origin_Intro_Karlach: May we all live up to the standard you set, Wyll. Somehow.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20201f5c-42ea-3108-be8a-51e90c76ca1cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1e0cd4bfg3bedg4c1egb11eg7fe147edbb2fText UUID: 6098ccdd-f7e2-46a0-9daa-3e5ff17a8cebTimeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 20201f5c-42ea-3108-be8a-51e90c76ca1cTimeline Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

      • +
        101.Player: For now. Life is long; anything could happen.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2ba1549e-3fe8-bf44-6d45-e78edb2c4f89Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc6143763g8179g4067ga584g4dec0bfb7af1Text UUID: 71b6ae04-ed8a-4da8-a92c-6338b659473dShow Once: True
        • +
          357.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If the gods are gods, they won't let Wyll Ravengard's soul stay forever in the hands of Zariel. You're too precious for that.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98a2c9e7-aaa8-d103-d248-7f827e8285e5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1b58eb1bg2609g4817g91fdgd9b675dff123Text UUID: b33207b4-325c-4ded-9469-840fa7388bc6Timeline Phase Index: 284Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 98a2c9e7-aaa8-d103-d248-7f827e8285e5Timeline Phase Duration: 10.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 66 Jump to Node 546
      • +
        213.Player: Let us think of other things. We still have plenty to do before giving up the ghost.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5ad98a35-8453-9abe-feb0-14fdc7400467Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha576ef83g6a03g417egb438g34321c6e9e3eText UUID: 7cbef6c6-927c-4f67-8e09-4fa814076ad0Show Once: True
        • +
          569.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Saving the city we love, for one. And for me, trying to live up to the standard you set.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee01ce3a-fd07-7717-0782-5c6a034c9edcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h1b6a9a06g317ag4decga6fcgd7931aa13bbcText UUID: 4784ca8e-7a80-47b1-a84a-124023ecda01Timeline Phase Index: 213Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ee01ce3a-fd07-7717-0782-5c6a034c9edcTimeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 66 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    2.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I can't believe Wyll's given up his soul to Zariel. For a father he fell out with ages ago. There's such a thing as being too good. Someone ought to tell Wyll Ravengard.TG_ORI_WyllEternalPact!TG_ORI_WyllEternalPact

    Flags and Tags

      552.Jump to Node 546

      Metadata

      Node Type: JumpUUID: e6feb1db-817e-aba8-f0ee-cf7ad3cdc3c9Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
  • -
    88.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You did the right thing, Wyll. Your father will die with honour. He will go with the gods. If you sacrificed yourself, you'd be lost forever.TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPactWyll!TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPact

    Flags and Tags

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 2757d3a0-bb89-85b4-3246-6ac58801d070Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h84f6520dgf6e6g4785g89d4g8a409b5755e4Text UUID: a2dc72dd-b98c-467d-b78e-e6728943c78dTimeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2757d3a0-bb89-85b4-3246-6ac58801d070Timeline Phase Duration: 18.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      354.Origin_Intro_Karlach: He would want this. I'm certain of it. Though I'm also certain I'd like to wring Mizora's neck for what she's put you through.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98042b1f-3796-7b21-8b2e-423806f20ca9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h8522fab2g6059g4367g8edfg1dd974298be0Text UUID: 0bb04a65-2538-468c-ad0d-736e761f0f92Group ID: 2757d3a0-bb89-85b4-3246-6ac58801d070Group Index: 1
      • +
        267.Player: I can't believe what I've done. My own father...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 78273acb-97d0-53c8-efda-73c00e4c6207Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc45c0a6agbb01g4e33gb43ag0cdefcc60b10Text UUID: 25ba0667-49f8-4c24-8e82-38f6616469b6Show Once: True
        • +
          89.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Your father is a legend. An honourable man who gave his life for his city. We all owe him gratitude - but you don't owe him your soul.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 27ca71ad-6b99-ab39-15ec-b4767d8a9ca9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3c6755b7ge920g4257gaea0g4837184c34acText UUID: df82cff1-c765-4416-aefd-e781059138f7Timeline Phase Index: 273Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 27ca71ad-6b99-ab39-15ec-b4767d8a9ca9Timeline Phase Duration: 10.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 66 Jump to Node 546
      • +
        216.Player: I should never have become entangled with Mizora. This is all my fault.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5c8d3e35-a857-be07-4a25-7e32d1bae4c9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h32ae9d6agf415g4fbagbca4g2762cf1248feText UUID: 5305a038-b35d-4fdb-9d07-6ec1dae4d0a7Show Once: True
        • +
          455.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You had no other choice. That's life, sometimes. Unfair as fuck. But you didn't do this - she did. You only played the hand you were dealt.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2120c85-b3a5-5394-34c6-2de804ca8591Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3d15b907ge4bcg40d3g9c31ga518baad2d8fText UUID: 74c43d97-ac47-476e-9c52-5ffc7a6fd248Timeline Phase Index: 197Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c2120c85-b3a5-5394-34c6-2de804ca8591Timeline Phase Duration: 11.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 66 Jump to Node 546
      • +
        413.Player: I hope my father would agree.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b0a9b9e7-0a0d-b467-1abc-ee787c041cf1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h34a2095ag97e5g4d4fg8bedg83e6e83e43c9Text UUID: 899609df-54d2-4faf-a5b2-5d814bc74351Show Once: True
        • +
          193.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Duke Ulder Ravengard would want what was best for his son. I know you two had your differences, but he loved you. He wouldn't change a thing.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53c009a4-34a2-1351-959d-3ea13d58d48fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h9a77241fg6e89g4486g8826g89e20cbfe197Text UUID: 601a1775-f75d-4ef8-889d-eeec12265836Timeline Phase Index: 277Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 53c009a4-34a2-1351-959d-3ea13d58d48fTimeline Phase Duration: 11.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 66 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    37.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I can't believe Wyll's given up his soul to Zariel. For a father he fell out with ages ago. There's such a thing as being too good. Someone ought to tell Wyll Ravengard.TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPact!TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPact

    558.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard. Has a ring to it, doesn't it? It sounds like... like a fate you earned.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsGrandDukeWyll!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsGrandDuke

    • +
      73.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I can't think of a better caretaker for the city I love. You're going to do so much for Baldur's Gate, Wyll.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 216c4a41-d6c7-0dae-4f9e-3bdbd3c841daSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h840381acgabe5g4dc4g9a86g0862af52f4cfText UUID: 26361509-a928-454e-bbe6-cb7f5ff68315Group ID: e9fbc617-282b-edfd-a49d-ba248b6a4589Group Index: 1

    394.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard. Has a ring to it, doesn't it? I can't think of a better caretaker for the Gate.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsGrandDuke!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsGrandDuke

  • -
    427.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Blade of Avernus. Has a ring to it, doesn't it? Give those devils everything you've got, Wyll. You'll have 'em shaking in their boots.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfAvernusWyll!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfAvernus

  • -
    175.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Blade of Avernus. I can't think of a better man than Wyll to take up the title. It's about time someone stood up to the evil fucks populating the Hells.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfAvernus!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfAvernus

    11.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Blade of Frontiers. A true return to form, isn't it. Proud of you, Wyll. As ever.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiersWyll!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiers

    541.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Blade of Frontiers. That's the Wyll we know and love, isn't it? Gods, that man really is the best.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiers!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiers

    13.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So - the gith prince, huh? We've got some decisions to make.TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateOrpheus!TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateOrpheus

    323.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let me do this, soldier. I can save us. What better way to go out?TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateKarlach!TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateKarlach

    141.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Damn, Shadowheart. I admit I'm impressed you beat a githyanki warrior, but I wish it didn't come to this.TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionLZ_KilledSHShadowheart!TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionLZ_KilledSH

    16.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Damn. Wish Lae'zel and Shadowheart could've solved that without coming to blows. I guess it's no surprise the githyanki warrior won out, but Shadowheart held her own.TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionLZ_KilledSH!TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionLZ_KilledSH

      287.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm going to miss her. She was all right.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 804a8688-ba57-3b54-8703-5b1fe8267d50Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3eb20e14gc8d4g49d1g9252ga4ba6e120c9fText UUID: d4a4500b-2eaf-4c6a-9801-383c77b3aa9dGroup ID: 08d4649e-a295-ec24-b3d6-11d6c72374fbGroup Index: 1
      • See Node 153 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    190.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Very glad Shadowheart and Lae'zel settled things without letting any blood. I would've enjoyed the spectacle, but not losing either one of those lunatics.TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_CompanionLZCompanionSH_Peaceful!TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_CompanionLZCompanionSH_Peaceful

    447.Origin_Intro_Karlach: She comes in here, into our camp, and lays hands on my Minthara?! Oh-ho, this shapeshifter is spoiling for a thrashing.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Minthara!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Minthara

    536.Origin_Intro_Karlach: She thinks she can take my druid and live to tell the tale? Dream on, shapeshifter. Karlach's coming for you.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Halsin!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Halsin

    71.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That bloody shapeshifting freak! No one takes my githyanki and gets away with it.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Laezel!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Laezel

    69.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That bloody freak won't get away with this. That's my wizard she took. And we're going to get him back.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Gale!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Gale

    164.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So we're knocking around with a vampire lord, now. We sure this is a good idea?TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionBecameVampireLord!TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionBecameVampireLord
