    • +
      320.Player: You dare question my lord Astarion?ORI_Astarion_Event_TurnIntoSpawn

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • ORI_Astarion_Event_TurnIntoSpawn {d7819489-bbe1-4d7c-96f2-d01c7c336115} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8d9cbcc2-abd9-2307-e080-e449123bc400Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5b2f2828gf9f1g4076g9791g7d6872fc6965Text UUID: 029ea230-c57b-42da-922b-5eb031b63a22Show Once: True
      • +
        167.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods, he turned you into a spawn. I knew you were close, but... not like this.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4be2b156-52f7-8b09-89f3-f5b4e027994dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h5883f760g9d88g4f71gbb7egab1d415088cdText UUID: 35102063-48c9-4dda-a286-c2238ea1a67dTimeline Phase Index: 305Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4be2b156-52f7-8b09-89f3-f5b4e027994dTimeline Phase Duration: 27sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 4be2b156-52f7-8b09-89f3-f5b4e027994dGroup Index: 0
        • +
          551.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I hope you know what you've gotten yourself into. I hope he treats you well. If he's even able to.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e6f611cf-27b3-384d-47d7-5ff8823bc701Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h37eb7516gbe0ag48d0ga66eg255f10cd73cdText UUID: 8f64e84e-3091-4756-b6d0-f014fcb28646Group ID: 4be2b156-52f7-8b09-89f3-f5b4e027994dGroup Index: 1
          • •
            23.Origin_Intro_Karlach: As for us... well, we can stick together until the city is well and truly saved. After that... we'll see. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0cf75015-048d-698a-050a-dc3efe0dcbeeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb7226286g1cc4g4b5fg80aag6df1137d6b6bText UUID: 64ed45c3-230e-492f-a372-e9b945ac2c93End Node: TrueGroup ID: 4be2b156-52f7-8b09-89f3-f5b4e027994dGroup Index: 2
    • +
      284.Player: This isn't just any vampire lord. It's Astarion - our friend.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7ed3c687-97f0-fca7-7c49-006210eefe40Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha69e58f7gc58fg4a1eg845eg7f376ec88548Text UUID: 448e8791-fda5-487e-925a-47389973f255Show Once: True
      • •
        195.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I hope he still sees it that way. Something tells me he's not the same person we knew. Not anymore. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53e0fe30-e585-329b-f2a2-97cb39cff3f6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6d3b6f4egd3b8g4e0fg9c62gfe0c7e0c93a1Text UUID: 15cd73e2-45bc-420c-92b0-ae29560e4a05Timeline Phase Index: 315Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 53e0fe30-e585-329b-f2a2-97cb39cff3f6Timeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
    • +
      138.Player: Do you propose abandoning him?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3f2b96f9-1dba-fa42-8f62-4d4e96cfcfccSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h74f976b9gd81cg4d6bg8e34g1a5c7b233d2fText UUID: c1e16078-3e56-4155-9669-21c790a0d59cShow Once: True
      • +
        182.Origin_Intro_Karlach: No. I mean - maybe. I don't know. I'm not sure what he's capable of now that he's so... changed.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 517605d7-f90a-2134-9f48-aa5dc5aa2284Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hcd0a0f90ge39fg49e8gb2cbgc82038315794Text UUID: d4599ffb-2ecf-429d-bc66-0f7b599d829eTimeline Phase Index: 300Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 517605d7-f90a-2134-9f48-aa5dc5aa2284Timeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 517605d7-f90a-2134-9f48-aa5dc5aa2284Group Index: 0
        • •
          466.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Time will tell. But I'm keeping an eye out. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c59817ff-60d0-5d40-fbcd-bee5f0151c34Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hce8d8b02gc218g4813g810agd26d6666d1b0Text UUID: 589c7529-2b16-4654-bdc9-ba84753127edEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 517605d7-f90a-2134-9f48-aa5dc5aa2284Group Index: 1
    • +
      523.Player: No - I'm not sure we can trust what he's become.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: de4abe79-69d3-77d0-3d0f-aff39ed269a7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0810f0c0gac0dg4e38g831fg6bdb1a7fd2a1Text UUID: 5131bab2-9109-4edf-aebd-ef7b35d09900Show Once: True
      • +
        346.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Me either. Luckily, vampires - even vampire lords - aren't as hard to kill as they may seem.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 968e31dd-73de-9b48-5bef-14e2f53aa9c3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h4ecf0e6ag23d4g47e7gb8c6g872c93ca31eaText UUID: 3414175c-aa33-4a17-bf57-885000f55731Timeline Phase Index: 298Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 968e31dd-73de-9b48-5bef-14e2f53aa9c3Timeline Phase Duration: 13.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 968e31dd-73de-9b48-5bef-14e2f53aa9c3Group Index: 0
        • •
          220.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I hope it won't come to that. But if it does, I'm ready. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e2b7984-c739-d1f6-60b2-b6354acf033bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he0adde2ag7c69g49fdgb13cgbe39e9142711Text UUID: 6d054ec8-2487-4001-9ca5-f95f88332b48End Node: TrueGroup ID: 968e31dd-73de-9b48-5bef-14e2f53aa9c3Group Index: 1
  • -
    393.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wish I could say I was surprised about Cazador's pact. Where blood, death, and betrayal parade, you can bet your arse a devil is riding grand marshal.TG_ORI_Astarion_RaphaelToldCompanionAboutRitual!TG_ORI_Astarion_RaphaelToldCompanionAboutRitual

    198.Origin_Intro_Karlach: He'd hate to hear me say this, but I'm so fucking proud of Astarion. He could've had it all, but he kept his soul instead.TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionStayedVampireSpawn!TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionStayedVampireSpawn

      47.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wasn't sure he had it in him, but he's changed so much. Overcome so much darkness. Ooh, I could smooch that pointy little face! [End]

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 197890e9-57e4-3796-7a60-09964e968a8aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h0d2f7394gbd95g4449gbab6g3a16c4d1a7b4Text UUID: d264ae4a-5db1-46fd-b0fd-e67827b7c810End Node: TrueGroup ID: 5683ffc9-3f87-e398-dda7-155b18b4bbafGroup Index: 1
  • -
    407.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Phew. Thought you and the walking fringe were gonna come to blows. You would've wiped the floor with her, but I'm glad you decided not to. I like having both of you around.TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarLZCompanionSH_PeacefulLae'zel!TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarLZCompanionSH_Peaceful

    • +
      238.Player: She was a Sharran first and foremost. It was up to her cloister to decide her fate.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6759564f-9338-3830-c5e3-78a5ed36ecafSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h86f85cbbga233g4011ga466g154ce5f2706cText UUID: db5faeac-6b59-4725-987f-ce3cbae25523Show Once: True
      • +
        538.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I guess so. I guess it all makes sense. But it doesn't feel right.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2d94b96-1ee4-2fb2-a166-c7ea6b5cde90Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h25f52b72g420cg46acg909dga583a6748c07Text UUID: b265c8d2-843f-4f4d-bd9a-a58b9c7fe8edTimeline Phase Index: 230Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e2d94b96-1ee4-2fb2-a166-c7ea6b5cde90Timeline Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • •
          391.Jump to Node 546

          Metadata

          Node Type: JumpUUID: a989f2d9-6e29-b5c6-942d-7b49d70cf900Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
    • +
      539.Player: I'm not sure. Who knows what Viconia has in mind for her...

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e2ddabfb-9bed-0159-00c4-cfd754041ba8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha8176e6fg493dg4a0bg9f45ge2b5f97d188cText UUID: 017eed09-d583-4634-9d80-e00d9af6d101Show Once: True
      • +
        579.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That's what I can't get out of my head. Whatever she is, whatever she's done, she deserves... I don't know. Not to be tormented by zealots.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f57edf1a-97cc-9707-c489-93db59c827fcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: haa19743dg23d2g4229g85b0g40df931cb824Text UUID: 6b1ea7ce-c428-43da-a90e-3e7ea912bb0dTimeline Phase Index: 210Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f57edf1a-97cc-9707-c489-93db59c827fcTimeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 391 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      288.Player: I can't speak to right and wrong - but it's finished now. We shouldn't dwell on it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 805beafd-0a42-7e5a-8c90-9341cd91b035Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc9c1ffc1g143eg4aa8ga1c4g952ee8303fb0Text UUID: 55634481-ba54-4e3d-bed7-92a1b6beb579Show Once: True
      • +
        535.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Whether we should or shouldn't, I'm gonna. Shadowheart was my friend. Or at least, I wanted her to be. I liked that little ball of points.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e19b20b7-4c05-37ed-970b-ae3d349c1293Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha0e3dec4gb2b7g40c3ga47dg19efe79fd831Text UUID: ef6f33b8-878b-4121-9e8c-09eb66b01847Timeline Phase Index: 229Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e19b20b7-4c05-37ed-970b-ae3d349c1293Timeline Phase Duration: 11.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 391 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      338.Player: In torture she will be free, she will remember only pain. Isn't that beautiful?Dark Urge

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

        400.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That doesn't make me feel better. In fact, it makes me want to vomit.

    421.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Mizora. I'd take anything she says with a grain of salt. But with her claws as deep in our business as they are, I guess we can't ignore her completely.TG_WYR_MizoraLeftWYR!TG_WYR_MizoraLeftWYR

    269.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You're glowing, Gale. Mystra must be very pleased with you indeed. Don't forget us little people when you're the Chosen of the God of Magic, hm?GaleTG_ORI_GaleBlessedByMystra!TG_ORI_GaleBlessedByMystra

    combine=0

    You're glowing, Gale. Mystra must be very pleased with you indeed. Don't forget us little people when you're the Chosen of the God of Magic, hm?

    • +
      504.Player: It's a long story involving the Weave, an ancient tome, and a failed attempt to please Mystra, goddess of magic.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d6d4a057-d1bb-c6b7-430c-4a185f4fd854Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he8645fc6gf261g4a11gbbf9gf2104f248914Text UUID: 1d79f7e6-1254-472b-9bdd-f7e4a847ab8eShow Once: True
      • +
        510.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hm. And now you have to consume gear Karlach really wants because...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d9b06557-108a-d6ad-e392-28e281a4ec29Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h222a1985g9e74g4422gaa78g6c297b1c2311Text UUID: c0368b0d-7dd6-4a97-95aa-909465fcb47bTimeline Phase Index: 221Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d9b06557-108a-d6ad-e392-28e281a4ec29Timeline Phase Duration: 6.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          482.Player: Because I have an orb of corrupted Weave within my chest. If I don't keep feeding it with magic, I'll explode with enough force to destroy a city.ORI_ND_Gale_MagicItems

          Flags and Tags

          settype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • ORI_ND_Gale_MagicItems {fe468ef0-81f0-87a1-23bb-f4a7ea1535ed} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cda2b653-795a-03ee-ec0e-e89c6967a421Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2b0df9abg5894g46abg8b86gab3a9387bfc1Text UUID: 619ffa30-07e1-4357-bfa6-ab954daa39baShow Once: True
          • +
            286.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well, shit. And I thought I had it bad.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8032a987-9d7f-eabc-f077-f2b95c557ed5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hc9921574ga38dg4383g82eeg7accf150400cText UUID: e430340c-d4d1-404a-880a-4006b5815d82Timeline Phase Index: 220Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8032a987-9d7f-eabc-f077-f2b95c557ed5Timeline Phase Duration: 22.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 8032a987-9d7f-eabc-f077-f2b95c557ed5Group Index: 0
            • +
              39.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That's a tough hand, Gale. But I'm glad you told me. A chest-bomb shared is a chest-bomb halved, or whatever.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 15f7261c-f598-905e-79dd-83e170ea2ac4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h842ddb4dg672dg4e70ga923gac2eef0184d9Text UUID: a77421bb-16c7-45cb-8cc9-3c9557ef9cbdGroup ID: 8032a987-9d7f-eabc-f077-f2b95c557ed5Group Index: 1
              • +
                212.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If I spot anything that'll help, I'll hand it right over, pal. We're in this together.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5911763f-6a0d-52df-6055-46ddcaf2d923Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hc98e23bdg8d99g4bceg904fg83d17ad74eebText UUID: adebec85-d9e8-4450-a513-17c12d6659f5Group ID: 8032a987-9d7f-eabc-f077-f2b95c557ed5Group Index: 2

          604.Player: Just because.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ff6b8cb5-c05e-d632-3771-03701dfea9a6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4d35b3cag3347g4fedgbc2bgca2c32d1e641Text UUID: 15bca02c-ed50-4c8f-9fbc-ba8985274be7Show Once: True
          • +
            84.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wizards and their secrets. Buddy, I could ruin that mind of yours with the stories I could tell. Nothing you say could scare me. When you're ready to talk, I'm ready to listen.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 253226b8-75cb-1048-8142-7890c2851addSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h02096e22g0598g4d7egae71g7bcf18d19fc1Text UUID: ac54af4c-d5c8-4ca7-a8b9-b00985ea0f1bTimeline Phase Index: 270Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 253226b8-75cb-1048-8142-7890c2851addTimeline Phase Duration: 13.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
            • See Node 365 Jump to Node 546
    • +
      27.Player: I had to consume it. Sorry if that scuppered any plans you had for it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0f970b50-56d9-57ff-1184-b209d8df21feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfefc9b1cg93f6g463fgba18g6edc89e8cf3cText UUID: 5b7fc0e1-5615-4745-8b8e-a911468e42aaShow Once: True
      • +
        460.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'd mind less if I knew the full story. Never seen a fellow suck the magic-marrow out of an item before.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c369d665-de0e-415f-caec-00396c1eaba9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb7b1a2c8gc80dg42e4g9bbfgb8debe37a9beText UUID: 5ad72401-ac9c-4d06-a599-9b09c0e0daecTimeline Phase Index: 189Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c369d665-de0e-415f-caec-00396c1eaba9Timeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          262.Player: I have an orb of corrupted Weave within my chest. If I don't keep feeding it with magic, I'll explode with enough force to destroy a city.ORI_ND_Gale_MagicItems

          Flags and Tags

          settype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • ORI_ND_Gale_MagicItems {fe468ef0-81f0-87a1-23bb-f4a7ea1535ed} = True

    495.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods. You've really done it now, haven't you.TG_DarkUrge_AcceptedBhaalDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_AcceptedBhaal

      593.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I need you to finish what we started. I need you to remember me - our mission - long enough for that. If you try anything else, I'll kill you. Understand?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9888a1d-41cd-bbc0-7a09-c8967e7e7e94Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h628a5d06g462dg4c69g8f27ge752d3343ccaText UUID: fc923e7b-72ef-42b2-9632-bc90bc1ec752Group ID: d23d0658-a2fe-1046-fd64-4bce4ab5ee5aGroup Index: 1

    574.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm speechless. A Bhaalist among us like this. If we didn't need the fucker, I'd say we run for the hills.TG_DarkUrge_AcceptedBhaal!TG_DarkUrge_AcceptedBhaal

      128.Origin_Intro_Karlach: This merits a celebration. You did what you had to do to get yourself right - to choose the life you wanted to live.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a73bd51-4584-6559-34ef-93f0a83f70f1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h8f8a5dbag605ag4108ga436gd8679613a007Text UUID: 8265d083-152c-4646-9b8f-76b560f56522Group ID: cc211e39-4620-4434-daa4-93edbb486ee9Group Index: 1
      • +
        462.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Very fuckin proud of you, mate. Seriously.!ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlach

    411.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I was really worried for a moment there. Thought we'd lost one of our own to forces beyond imagining. I'm so glad I was wrong.TG_DarkUrge_DefiedBhaal!TG_DarkUrge_DefiedBhaal

    374.Origin_Intro_Karlach: There we have it. You were working with Gortash. You were a chosen of Bhaal. I guess you still are.TG_DarkUrge_GortashOMDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_GortashOM

    • +
      389.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I want to say it doesn't make sense - but it makes perfect sense, doesn't it? I should've seen it earlier. All the signs were there.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a824f85a-f9d5-3cee-1105-c74bc7da9399Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he64edfadg085fg45b9gbd4cg66d50d8ad499Text UUID: 012f4372-605e-4f82-b934-c1bfb56eeb4cGroup ID: a0a008ff-8c1d-d660-6f3a-d0d57e24ac5dGroup Index: 1
      • •
        602.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I don't want to talk now. Give me time. A lot of it. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fdc68404-db72-0b7e-e921-3ef467be7599Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h3e69f5f7g6e6dg42b9g93ffgf9e7fa3fbca8Text UUID: 0c7f6e8e-5516-483a-93a6-e2d52f5da233End Node: TrueGroup ID: a0a008ff-8c1d-d660-6f3a-d0d57e24ac5dGroup Index: 2
  • -
    42.Origin_Intro_Karlach: There we have it. A Chosen of Bhaal. An ally of Gortash. Right under my nose.TG_DarkUrge_GortashOM!TG_DarkUrge_GortashOM

      266.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I want to say it doesn't make sense - but it makes perfect sense, doesn't it? I should've seen it earlier. All the signs were there.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 77765f0d-f048-4fa1-9ade-ebcc0ae25856Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h149e63a3g1262g47adg9057g4d6bcbd99534Text UUID: 704d36df-c545-4607-a8a5-40f23c2300fcGroup ID: 1866b631-39c9-5486-e114-757ad691c88eGroup Index: 1

    • +
      332.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, I don't care what you look like - what form you can take. I care who you are. And you're... you're not who I thought you'd be. Who I'd hoped you'd be.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 916d31bb-caec-dd41-d8c9-28f4dd40aa5fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6cdcf467g9626g43dag8322gf4697c639243Text UUID: 0f8530e2-c383-499d-ae37-180e6b4f4483Group ID: 9b73d10f-4ef5-27c1-3c0f-3fd75cdcbfddGroup Index: 1
      • +
        516.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We're allies - for now - and we have a mission far greater than your... predilections. Stay sane long enough for us to save the city. Then we'll see where we stand.VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

        Flags and Tags

      194.Player: I don't know. I'm out of control. Help me.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 53ce6a6f-4649-ed70-72ed-e85e7d628950Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8e670492g6d2dg4e6ag83fdgd487130910c4Text UUID: fc3b216d-0be1-4520-b85b-2d19024ef3b7Show Once: True
      • +
        131.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I want to, but I don't know how. And I'm starting to wonder if there's anything I can do. Or anything you can do.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3c3c8c44-3cd0-edc7-b557-5dfbb166863bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hec4cd33bge33bg43ebgb4d9gf7c28ad64b1aText UUID: e7441236-3197-45b5-a712-ff712d616b0fTimeline Phase Index: 239Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3c3c8c44-3cd0-edc7-b557-5dfbb166863bTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • •
          226.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You have to stay strong. You have to resist. If you don't, we're all doomed. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 606d71a6-2e8a-1252-1508-82dadfff4671Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf33b91e9g8562g463dgb196g532219726919Text UUID: 28d1e26c-63fa-477f-8ebf-39076714027eTimeline Phase Index: 314Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 606d71a6-2e8a-1252-1508-82dadfff4671Timeline Phase Duration: 8.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True
    • +
      108.Player: The cleric is gone. The shadows have devoured the innocent. Oh, glorious night!

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 319a3f07-f572-2405-9d16-1e785739d9b3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd1321521g100fg4dbfgaa9bg494b63eeee52Text UUID: e2a6ae03-4593-4501-9adf-a387d481cf03Show Once: True
      • +
        137.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You're mad. My gods.

        Metadata

        • See Node 226 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) You have to stay strong. You have to resist. If you don't, we're all doomed.

    200.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I can't believe it. We killed him. Minsc. The beloved ranger.TG_ORI_MinscNotSaved!TG_ORI_MinscNotSaved

    • +
      298.Origin_Intro_Karlach: His mind was all addled - like a bog standard True Soul. But... he could've been brought round. Couldn't he?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84c034c7-9654-b1ee-3388-c5dc4b916065Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h2c6f6e93g7183g42b9gb844g4a3b7ffeddbcText UUID: a8a4f4ff-df15-4e23-95ee-d4941e720977Group ID: 568b81f7-31f4-69f5-b042-ac6b3b8ddd3aGroup Index: 1
      • +
        249.Player: It was too risky to wait and see. He was coming at us with all he had.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6e1b645a-eca1-4a19-4ecd-393c77855f5dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5ae6e375g7521g40b7g8397g5b62882e1c1dText UUID: ba1ff401-037c-4c67-b106-bdcab4f00f3eShow Once: True
        • +
          417.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We should've been more careful. Knocked him out, you know? The Astral Prism might've brought him round, same as it did for us.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b243b399-0180-ff07-9f83-02416147568bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h52a41ba1gab7bg429fg90feg95eb0f78023fText UUID: a75358a8-dddb-455b-bb42-a0617c060db3Timeline Phase Index: 272Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b243b399-0180-ff07-9f83-02416147568bTimeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            531.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Minsc was a hero. He deserved a hero's death. Not this. We'll avenge him. The Dead Three did this, really. And we're going to stop their fucked up plan in its tracks.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e05de6dc-2f3e-eeb1-5862-a913614efc9dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h67d3bfa9gd69cg41b8g80b2g92f8e4edc947Text UUID: 7bb512c6-2657-45dd-be98-64a8a27ef997Timeline Phase Index: 226Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e05de6dc-2f3e-eeb1-5862-a913614efc9dTimeline Phase Duration: 17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •

      • +
        150.Player: Maybe. But we'll never know now.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 42e75028-022d-9929-bff7-6aa8624b46a4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb1dd102fg94c2g4ddcgaaa9gaa4da8955319Text UUID: d4e3fa9c-4765-48c6-9212-5de4dc9038c0Show Once: True

          278.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Dammit. What a mess.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7a92977d-2116-646c-13eb-7c2d03fc9cfcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h7644950bg4e7ag4ee1ga461gff0bb66eebfaText UUID: 663ac582-6bd2-4ebe-b33c-317e878427b4Timeline Phase Index: 249Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7a92977d-2116-646c-13eb-7c2d03fc9cfcTimeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 531 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Minsc was a hero. He deserved a hero's death. Not this. We'll avenge him. The Dead Three did this, really. And we're going to stop their fucked up plan in its tracks.
      • +
        181.Player: He attacked us. We attacked back. Simple as.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 51176aa9-c24f-65e3-821b-57fac18e1b9dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3108487cg7f6bg4562g9cf3gdc5b48a84a6cText UUID: c69594ba-e631-4ccf-94d7-78f18e5e1768Show Once: True
        • +
          176.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But... argh! I wish we could've held back a little. Knocked him out, seen if the Astral Prism would've brought him round.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f7fe3ba-a010-6d40-f8cd-c149e70478b6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb0f88d28g19b4g42d7g980cg2e70d3c86f46Text UUID: 6edb0f03-4d2c-41ea-be7d-8dbf554260aaTimeline Phase Index: 291Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f7fe3ba-a010-6d40-f8cd-c149e70478b6Timeline Phase Duration: 9.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 531 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Minsc was a hero. He deserved a hero's death. Not this. We'll avenge him. The Dead Three did this, really. And we're going to stop their fucked up plan in its tracks.
  • -
    92.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Minsc just joined our team. This is the best day of my life.TG_ORI_MinscRecruited!TG_ORI_MinscRecruited

    524.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Minsc is working for the cult? Damn. He must've been tadpoled - or worse. The real Minsc would never join up with the godsdamned Absolute.TG_LOW_Guildhall_MinscIsStoneLord!TG_LOW_Guildhall_MinscIsStoneLord

      430.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Maybe we can help him - the Prism, right? It should shut that tadpole up - if he doesn't kick our butts first. It's kind of his thing.

    517.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Shapeshifters in the Harpers. My dad always admired their mission - said they gave up their entire lives so we could live safely, and asked for nothing in return. We'll rout them, right? For the city - and for dad.TG_WYR_Axe_AmbushResolved!TG_WYR_Axe_AmbushResolved

    Text

    Shapeshifters in the Harpers. My dad always admired their mission - said they gave up their entire lives so we could live safely, and asked for nothing in return. We'll rout them, right? For the city - and for dad.

    145.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's done. It had to be done. Astarion was... out of control. Gods dammit.TG_ORI_Astarion_BetrayedAstarionVampireLordToGur!TG_ORI_Astarion_BetrayedAstarionVampireLordToGur

      44.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, he was an evil leech, but he was ours. I thought he'd changed. I was wrong. I always am these days.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 18d47644-a0e1-182c-ac51-b0aa24a56097Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbea83e93g45a6g4db3g8627geeee54e5e641Text UUID: f047fa7c-cdcc-4d90-8aee-2e71e8f08832Group ID: 41db74ec-aad1-e341-b9f2-99f239aaf878Group Index: 1

  • -
    442.Origin_Intro_Karlach: And? Is it everything you hoped it would be?TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarBecameVampireLordAstarion!TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarBecameVampireLord

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: bc407e33-bbd3-2d5d-0b5a-d0ae92fc70e9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: ha85396cbg5067g456cg9f26g11a920b44df7Text UUID: 14f08309-eb63-4b18-af3a-8a5e4a63bc54Timeline Phase Index: 106Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bc407e33-bbd3-2d5d-0b5a-d0ae92fc70e9Timeline Phase Duration: 6.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: True
    • +
      548.Player: I think it is. I am finally free. I am finally more powerful than Cazador. It was the only way.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e607e821-4e75-3eec-d234-23812d401f80Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h21f50619g8b21g4a3ag9ca1g8a59b06457c9Text UUID: 7c20c2a5-3fcc-4294-a7d9-32935c63b525Show Once: True
      • •
        392.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Maybe. Maybe not. But it is what it is. I'll stand by you until our mission is done - but I may not stick around long enough to see what you do with all this new power. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9c1d03a-bc46-e79d-c278-49e84d8ca456Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h2ac427acg0df3g4d09g9d77ge0a4ea793c37Text UUID: 1e249f57-5925-4b0c-a28b-43d3057bd7f2Timeline Phase Index: 310Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a9c1d03a-bc46-e79d-c278-49e84d8ca456Timeline Phase Duration: 16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
    • +
      562.Player: Everything and so much more.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: eb955b42-743a-b170-3982-3726b932202cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h77064769gd4a2g4686g8861g83830fbf2ba1Text UUID: 112d6aa5-1b8a-4fc5-80aa-1f7160758883Show Once: True
      • •
        221.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wield your new power well. I have a real thing for stopping evil in its tracks these days. And unlike you, I'm not afraid to die. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e3656a3-8b9d-3472-902e-20973036a074Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h63065426g5d00g4da8g96a3gdb793642e2caText UUID: 387283fe-3b4b-44e2-a650-3b206e054e50Timeline Phase Index: 299Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e3656a3-8b9d-3472-902e-20973036a074Timeline Phase Duration: 12.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
    • +
      446.Player: It will be, if you kneel before me.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: be0a9308-97e1-f330-8f1a-519798176496Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h37ca28e9ge6e2g49f8ga276g5031a3a9dcacText UUID: 6b5f73c2-dadd-44d1-a692-87d09bb410beShow Once: True
      • •
        208.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Don't push your luck, Astarion. Killing vampires - even ones as powerful as you - isn't that hard, you know. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5874a93f-a068-85ef-456a-f5b831e14d63Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h945e244bg31eag453bgbcfagecce508f8f61Text UUID: 6cda3aa5-a3d9-4869-a025-2c645f884fb1Timeline Phase Index: 301Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5874a93f-a068-85ef-456a-f5b831e14d63Timeline Phase Duration: 9.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
    • +
      390.Player: You will wait to speak until you are spoken to.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a91bad61-1a7f-07d5-2ee4-604c952b94cfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: heaf915bag4281g42fagbbe3gdd195f1743a2Text UUID: 018ef764-aa87-4f11-bfd6-69ccb8680e7fShow Once: True

        36.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Go fuck yourself, Astarion. [End]

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: bd907a3a-3455-6cbb-a094-cb16187d300aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h27ba9cecg0c84g4927ga393ge6df7ce22d2fText UUID: e4761b4e-7ce5-4f9b-b32c-e371008854b8Timeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd907a3a-3455-6cbb-a094-cb16187d300aTimeline Phase Duration: 17.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      382.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You could've had it all - but it would've cost you your soul. You kept what was worth keeping. That can't have been easy.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a65d2183-ee28-b955-3be1-30ab5f039347Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h5af0da9ag2863g44f4g9197g4436fa19b226Text UUID: 4ac4670d-8b4e-43ad-bd3f-0c6e57ed5a3bGroup ID: bd907a3a-3455-6cbb-a094-cb16187d300aGroup Index: 1
      • +
        1.Player: Ugh. Don't remind me.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 008ef8b4-ea8b-01a8-9a42-c026ed4dbdabSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd3b6bf46g0211g411dgab43g753da4316b92Text UUID: e2a451cc-c1b4-46c9-8f4f-fc96ab5734d5Show Once: True
        • •
          155.Origin_Intro_Karlach: No promises. You deserve to be told and told again what an incredible person you are. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45bf8601-912d-e2c5-ce9c-467e3aca69b5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he559d50bg63bbg43c8ga133g3e31fab4a3f5Text UUID: 64ba3c13-bae6-415b-a234-7ca595895daaTimeline Phase Index: 306Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45bf8601-912d-e2c5-ce9c-467e3aca69b5Timeline Phase Duration: 6.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
      • +
        416.Player: It wasn't. And I'm not sure I made the right choice.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b1d8d980-d0cf-237f-198d-4a2ce1d7bd3aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h74f8f381g5170g4e57g9a9dge5ed4c9b50a3Text UUID: 4f706e9f-d7c4-4401-92d6-9484d765933dShow Once: True
        • •
          250.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Give it time. Soon you'll start to see yourself how I see you: A man of integrity. Honour. And other words you absolutely detest. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e51b0b1-e71e-ff51-43f8-397b058b4902Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h11883906g48e5g4c96g89cdg3a1b0f996361Text UUID: 898e333d-d41e-41b3-8092-1421fb63d332Timeline Phase Index: 304Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6e51b0b1-e71e-ff51-43f8-397b058b4902Timeline Phase Duration: 14.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
      • +
        172.Player: Honestly, it was all right. I've changed so much, thanks in part to you.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4ea2fc49-f77e-4f5f-fb8b-394ec42a09f2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h95555bd8g2d48g4a68g973aga3598262ba51Text UUID: f7379d92-dd9b-49de-9ae7-abec8c70229aShow Once: True
        • •
          571.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You've done the same for me. Who would've thought a vampire and a hellspawn could go so far together? [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef95b662-6d8c-ab37-796d-3b4459331718Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: had7a0414g0ed9g44c1g96b7g8e0b710562f0Text UUID: d5259b33-0135-44e7-94ec-4fa122b300e3Timeline Phase Index: 303Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef95b662-6d8c-ab37-796d-3b4459331718Timeline Phase Duration: 8.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True

    508.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I dare Cazador to send more lackeys our way. This is our territory. I'll crack anyone who tries to come into my house and hurt my people.TG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnAmbushFailed!TG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnAmbushFailed

    588.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wish I could say I was surprised about Cazador's pact. Where blood, death, and betrayal parade, you can bet your arse a devil is riding grand marshal.ORI_Astarion_Knows_RitualsPurposeTG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnToldRitual!TG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnToldRitual

    499.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wish I could say I was surprised about Cazador's pact. Where blood, death, and betrayal parade, you can bet your arse a devil is riding grand marshal.TG_ORI_Astarion_RaphaelToldAvatarAboutRitual!TG_ORI_Astarion_RaphaelToldAvatarAboutRitual

    282.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wish we could stay and see what this place will be like without the shadows. I bet it's beautiful. No rest for the wicked, huh?TG_GLO_LiftingTheCurse_LiftedCurse!TG_GLO_LiftingTheCurse_LiftedCurse

    321.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Absolute wants the Prism. The githyanki want the Prism. Shar wants the Prism too. Phew, this thing means an awful lot to a lot of people.TG_LOW_KnowSharransMotivations!TG_LOW_KnowSharransMotivations

    • +
      494.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Us more than anyone. Without that thing, we'd have been drooling True Souls.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d1dce320-180d-2577-2f58-a47e73dc614eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he148f2c8g3cd6g461eg87e5gcda14aa50f3eText UUID: c02e6cd1-6cae-4189-93bf-dd7a3256785eGroup ID: 8e132e02-d9f4-3499-b569-910641b53827Group Index: 1
      • +
        192.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Surprised to find I share an aim with Shar herself, but the Absolute has to be stopped. Let Shar have the lost - better that than the Netherbrain.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 538cf6b1-c9e6-cd10-e56b-73990d1f8a42Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6544e11dg45d8g4589gb037g2b26b0707c27Text UUID: 1d60f69a-ad30-4bfd-b510-266dd22add2eGroup ID: 8e132e02-d9f4-3499-b569-910641b53827Group Index: 2
        • See Node 62 Jump to Node 546
  • -
    275.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Shadowheart versus Lae'zel. I can't believe ol' mysteria defeated a githyanki warrior.TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionSH_KilledLZShadowheart!TG_ORI_LaezelShadowheartFight_AvatarOrCompanionSH_KilledLZ

    • +
      537.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I've underestimated you. Won't make that mistake again.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2b439f3-653b-0c18-db6a-20397b1d38c9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h034c101cg5bfbg4fa0gb3d4g37b49660e29fText UUID: d2a8df86-aa03-4fa8-ab9a-b0aa24311da8Group ID: 7a1c15c7-d851-0d78-6214-02f2a1749235Group Index: 1
      • +
        154.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'll miss Lae'zel. But I guess it was never going to work with that artefact on the line. May she rest in... well, something more exciting than peace. She deserves that much.

    • +
      488.Player: That was Elminster Aumar - the most famous wizard in the realms.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cfd0314b-9fc8-7434-08da-63799aba3457Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4efafa52g0959g4720g9fcfg66860cc11bebText UUID: c1e4f5e6-2770-46a0-ae9c-e94a29b034e1Show Once: True
      • +
        29.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Huh. Doesn't ring a bell. But all right! Must've had something important to say to Gale, if he came all this way. Good news, I hope.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0fd84550-24d6-0755-226d-c361793e4fd0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h43e48efdg981bg4143gbf7bg7d474c993e41Text UUID: 0da48a90-2e98-4196-a07b-6bd98e697933Timeline Phase Index: 228Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0fd84550-24d6-0755-226d-c361793e4fd0Timeline Phase Duration: 11sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          293.Player: I don't think it was. It turns out Gale has an explosive bomb in his chest - and Mystra has asked him to use it to blow up the heart of the Absolute.!ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBombORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb {0d077ccf-5802-75df-7aac-5ed6ef02fcd9} = False
          settype Global
          • ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb {0d077ccf-5802-75df-7aac-5ed6ef02fcd9} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8349020f-a754-f6eb-7f1b-aa8b2efba752Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9e5b10acg4fbag4205g960ag624938eeca09Text UUID: 12a77418-576c-4bfb-be42-52018f067510Show Once: True
          • +
            191.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Whoa, now. He's got a... well, I guess that would explain a little, but... Mystra... I mean, this is a lot to take in.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5388c097-22bd-d89e-1476-e7721272b472Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h70dc0fc3gc408g4e0dgb8aag9c32695d84caText UUID: b37df45e-b065-4095-bc70-3b8876c1dd7fTimeline Phase Index: 282Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5388c097-22bd-d89e-1476-e7721272b472Timeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              157.Origin_Intro_Karlach: What's he going to do?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 47f97f05-f834-eb82-6e4f-e342d7ff037aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf579b21dg0cc9g489agb56ag2d2c7dade459Text UUID: fac7a066-6961-4bd2-b129-5e0d698541a2Timeline Phase Index: 254Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 47f97f05-f834-eb82-6e4f-e342d7ff037aTimeline Phase Duration: 2.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                45.Player: I think he's going to follow through with it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 18d831d6-ae20-27ce-de63-004d31974934Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc6842174g1bf1g4d46g9b86g39ea00ae7ac7Text UUID: 7987c335-66f0-4590-8264-cded26c53134Show Once: True
                • +
                  525.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Fuck me. There's devotion, and then there's stupidity. If the god of magic can't handle this without sacrificing Gale, she's no god at all.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de987c73-91e7-5b4a-8da9-de96fb58a916Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h9ce4cc15g47e5g46b2ga6ebg77c37c26ade4Text UUID: 9501f8ca-0500-4643-bc43-3a10245e8c0fTimeline Phase Index: 231Timeline Dialog Node UUID: de987c73-91e7-5b4a-8da9-de96fb58a916Timeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    178.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Poor Gale. He must be in bits after hearing that. I'll distract him. Tell him I haven't read a book since secondary school, watch his face melt off.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4fe665de-d806-f374-be84-ae26ee78a779Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h6ec6beccge792g4a47gbaabg75415ff69840Text UUID: bb3fa838-7181-4560-9471-299cb658c969Timeline Phase Index: 258Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4fe665de-d806-f374-be84-ae26ee78a779Timeline Phase Duration: 18.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                    • •
                      20.Jump to Node 546

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 0ae33260-7fc7-dee7-2ec5-0fdc32c4a6a7Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
              • +
                575.Player: I don't think he'd do that to himself, even if Mystra commanded it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f2505dc4-3e7f-5194-79f0-cd9024c24ac4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0c76b099g40dfg4339gb63eg7b80a8d71130Text UUID: 1947b629-e191-449c-ba7b-c982194b3b10Show Once: True
                • +
                  343.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Good. I'm one hundred percent sure there's another way to bring down this cult. No true god would ask such a thing from her faithful. That's for certain.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9489e0c1-e4ae-01ce-2249-89fec3427742Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hcf2fd06fg3e81g46efga527gb0a35ee95565Text UUID: 10f11c81-50a5-48aa-8099-16c34abae886Timeline Phase Index: 267Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9489e0c1-e4ae-01ce-2249-89fec3427742Timeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 178 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Poor Gale. He must be in bits after hearing that. I'll distract him. Tell him I haven't read a book since secondary school, watch his face melt off.
              • +
                409.Player: I'm not sure. I think he's of several minds.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: afd60277-a150-e532-22d2-2330294981e7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h53e5e327g2193g468fg98feg825cecb6a13aText UUID: 5d60924d-d72d-4e7e-b45b-568ccc48e3d2Show Once: True
                • +
                  315.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well, tell him to pick the right one. Better yet, I'll do it. Fucking wizards, man! They always need help picking the simple, obvious option.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ad36839-008b-be4a-68de-d6d7b69d5956Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h669f2850g567dg4386g8417gb78be29488eaText UUID: d70ee432-7099-4fbe-8931-d636ba822f20Timeline Phase Index: 236Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8ad36839-008b-be4a-68de-d6d7b69d5956Timeline Phase Duration: 23.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 8ad36839-008b-be4a-68de-d6d7b69d5956Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    493.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If Mystra can't think of another way to stop the Absolute than sacrificing Gale, she's no god worth worshipping. I'll say that to Gale - in, you know, gentle terms.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d145b00b-b771-60b4-ea6d-9e87318f2813Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h5ebf94b7g827cg41bdg8098g9b72d99ab85cText UUID: 7213f96b-d121-4a12-bd93-e75d4f0041caGroup ID: 8ad36839-008b-be4a-68de-d6d7b69d5956Group Index: 1
                    • See Node 20 Jump to Node 546
        • +
          247.Player: You know that bomb in Gale's chest? Mystra has asked him to use it to explode the heart of the Absolute.ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb {0d077ccf-5802-75df-7aac-5ed6ef02fcd9} = True

            435.Origin_Intro_Karlach: She what?! Is she mad?!

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b9795367-7716-92c0-18de-b8fd4511c6c0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h7c1ea3a3gcc88g4d0agab87gf9b928005453Text UUID: 642550d8-526b-4393-9a34-5e4853fe50b5Timeline Phase Index: 191Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b9795367-7716-92c0-18de-b8fd4511c6c0Timeline Phase Duration: 5.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 157 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) What's he going to do?
        • +
          566.Player: Don't worry about it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ecfdffcf-aff2-07dd-7a22-0dc95124c71eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3c19a9d3gede8g43dbgba49gc07449b5ea5aText UUID: fb504901-d198-4e07-b835-cb531f6b2437Show Once: True
          • +
            405.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Karlach doesn't worry, she acts. So if Gale needs me, now's the time to tell me.

      292.Player: That was Elminster Aumar - the most famous wizard in the realms.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8334d371-ac4a-7254-8c85-72f66c1ef4d0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb242c311g7612g43bbgb68dg2d182d5bd7a2Text UUID: b0bd750a-c3e5-400e-a21f-4fd348c38492Show Once: True
      • +
        599.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Huh. Doesn't ring a bell. But all right! Must've had something important to say, if he came all this way. Good news, I hope.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb914343-a396-db03-c3e4-f776e8dd655eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb47a44cag33fbg46d6g9f5fg5da3bfe2c914Text UUID: cdfd5f5d-2e25-43b5-9887-4204417d9506Timeline Phase Index: 203Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fb914343-a396-db03-c3e4-f776e8dd655eTimeline Phase Duration: 11sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          542.Player: It relates to a 'condition' I have. I carry an orb of corrupted Weave within my chest. It seems Mystra wants me to detonate that orb and destroy the 'Heart of the Absolute.'!ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBombORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb

          Flags and Tags

            529.Jump to Node 424

            Metadata

            Node Type: JumpUUID: dfa78fc3-0ca1-7f80-0790-774900f6f6cbJump Target: Node 424 (b47d6da9-3fd6-4e8c-c277-f40daeb6dda3)Jump Target Point: 2
        • +
          424.Player: He brought instructions from Mystra. I'm to find the Heart of the Absolute, and destroy it by detonating the orb in my chest.ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb {0d077ccf-5802-75df-7aac-5ed6ef02fcd9} = True

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b47d6da9-3fd6-4e8c-c277-f40daeb6dda3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd0499fa6gc43ag48e5g9861g4cdfd4fbc3b4Text UUID: 8d3088d6-9f0a-4b07-9086-6ee051285132Show Once: True
          • +
            94.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The orb in your chest? Shit - I knew something was going on with you, but I didn't know the particulars. 960f4fdb-12dd-85df-7236-c4bae9c444fc_Topic123

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Local
            • 960f4fdb-12dd-85df-7236-c4bae9c444fc_Topic123 {c42bdf9c-e03e-7931-90fc-a397d5287592} = True

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2975d756-6ce9-e383-2fb3-a2e078ce5f78Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h92cfef5dg2f00g4612gb8c1gc1172a49efe3Text UUID: e8e3c8c4-69db-48ad-a36b-9735055cff9dTimeline Phase Index: 280Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2975d756-6ce9-e383-2fb3-a2e078ce5f78Timeline Phase Duration: 19.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 2975d756-6ce9-e383-2fb3-a2e078ce5f78Group Index: 0
            • +
              501.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well. Turns out we have more in common than I knew. Except I'm trying not to blow up, and you've been instructed to do just that.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d432c701-b22f-9bab-86df-947cbba2d71bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hc041c7acgef67g4100g9f55g14c4df89b943Text UUID: bc8a51ab-0632-4c92-9758-b352d7aa4a61Group ID: 2975d756-6ce9-e383-2fb3-a2e078ce5f78Group Index: 1

                159.Jump to Node 114

                Metadata

                Node Type: JumpUUID: 490c4c66-b8d7-e09b-9c3d-8340d1ebac3cJump Target: Node 114 (34b0f989-e773-570a-0795-68bc6d7c974f)Jump Target Point: 1
          • +
            223.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wow. That's... that's big, Gale. This is Mystra we're talking about. Goddess of magic - and she's asking you to sacrifice yourself.!960f4fdb-12dd-85df-7236-c4bae9c444fc_Topic123

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Local

            • +
              114.Origin_Intro_Karlach: What are you thinking?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34b0f989-e773-570a-0795-68bc6d7c974fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h47876d54gd0b9g4fd7g9b62g8befb272fdfbText UUID: 31736d3d-606c-4817-a4b1-0e46a5549ec6Timeline Phase Index: 286Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 34b0f989-e773-570a-0795-68bc6d7c974fTimeline Phase Duration: 4.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                587.Player: This could be my chance at redemption. I have to at least consider dong what she asked.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f75ca4cd-ec1f-d2c8-1d67-c828a5af2adeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0ffb82feg39f9g43dbg93dagbf9393049fd1Text UUID: 1e692022-4cdf-42f1-9ebd-f06d975bd082Show Once: True
                • +
                  90.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Only you can decide if that's really true. If you owe her your life. As for me, I'm positive we can stop the Absolute without losing you, Gale.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 27f4f806-0af6-49ff-6572-75e012c03da6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h7207d0b6gb0aag44ecgb4c6g353cad390d87Text UUID: 3eaade3f-7b4b-4a15-97e2-39bf74f55567Timeline Phase Index: 274Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 27f4f806-0af6-49ff-6572-75e012c03da6Timeline Phase Duration: 16.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    255.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Keep that in mind, all right?

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72bf9ec7-387a-a652-5fd2-89751a0dc013Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h37592ad7g191fg4704g80a4gd00a646c8a7bText UUID: cd1c8feb-d417-4cdb-a775-239c9c82290dTimeline Phase Index: 256Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 72bf9ec7-387a-a652-5fd2-89751a0dc013Timeline Phase Duration: 4.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                      7.Jump to Node 546

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 04e2bedb-9ba6-59e5-6144-4f5b4a957465Jump Target: Node 546 (e5ac3171-601a-d56b-1360-a74ba19e8ab5)Jump Target Point: 1
              • +
                253.Player: I'm not quite sure yet. It's a big decision.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 713d681b-ea29-3618-f540-7bfc3f6b4da9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h669525fagaf09g4ffag88c5gaf6b6addd7c7Text UUID: 189372a9-1144-4c58-9d51-58f12c399d22Show Once: True
                • +
                  438.Origin_Intro_Karlach: No kidding. What could be bigger? Look, I know what it's like to house something dangerous inside you. But I don't know what it's like for someone else - someone I trust - to ask me to use it against myself.

                  Text

                  No kidding. What could be bigger? Look, I know what it's like to house something dangerous inside you. But I don't know what it's like for someone else - someone I trust - to ask me to use it against myself.
                  he0124550gde7fg42adgb280g43416cb743f1 | dbef2e02-ae7d-4403-b840-1dd3f49117d0 | stub

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb44b705-d94f-17c2-10cd-9b0cbbc17279Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he0124550gde7fg42adgb280g43416cb743f1Text UUID: dbef2e02-ae7d-4403-b840-1dd3f49117d0Timeline Phase Index: 253Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bb44b705-d94f-17c2-10cd-9b0cbbc17279Timeline Phase Duration: 25.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: bb44b705-d94f-17c2-10cd-9b0cbbc17279Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    218.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If you need a friend, you know where to find me. Right here. Right now.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d7b3eb7-04d3-d9fa-fca1-bd063339eaa7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h83d760bagd86ag411dgafbagbe53c72cb440Text UUID: 1f44f820-8eec-4818-872b-1d9088d3b7e2Group ID: bb44b705-d94f-17c2-10cd-9b0cbbc17279Group Index: 1
                    • See Node 7 Jump to Node 546
              • +
                136.Player: Now that I'm over the shock, I'll probably ignore her request entirely.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3f0cdea9-9fe9-41d0-26eb-10784b5576aaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h09ef4ebcgfc42g4949ga37agd6b1b232dc2dText UUID: 776e1c27-1d45-458c-83b8-6734d1e6ed36Show Once: True
                • +
                  555.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm glad to hear you say that. It is shocking. Imagine asking someone to - to end themselves like that.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e909973f-48d5-60e1-45e3-d257f6283eccSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h61ea6565g165dg44dbg8f1cgf20be2ad2b89Text UUID: ff67f0cb-57bb-470d-9c0e-adaa1cba6172Timeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e909973f-48d5-60e1-45e3-d257f6283eccTimeline Phase Duration: 22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: e909973f-48d5-60e1-45e3-d257f6283eccGroup Index: 0
                  • +
                    54.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Nothing's ever simple anymore, is it? Whatever you decide, I've got your back. But I think we can defeat the Absolute without losing you, Gale.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1be38b4c-fcf3-26af-3543-67226c45fefdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h124ac050g50d6g4624g9d66gb2a1675c4c82Text UUID: f03064e8-7ecf-4580-81da-b26afe758a3fGroup ID: e909973f-48d5-60e1-45e3-d257f6283eccGroup Index: 1
                    • •

        • +
          41.Player: That remains to be seen.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 16ef379b-2e49-547b-aa24-9a008435ad8eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h240000a4g24a8g48c3gb523gcf9da46d5d9fText UUID: 62ab03ad-c7a5-4702-86aa-d8d1495234e7Show Once: True
          • +
            104.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Oh? What did he say?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c67add7-2670-7c20-ca62-31bb75140527Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he2dc0583g13c1g4aabg9d9dg659f229d59d7Text UUID: a7da98cf-70d6-49e7-b35b-ee715126ba42Timeline Phase Index: 292Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2c67add7-2670-7c20-ca62-31bb75140527Timeline Phase Duration: 3.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •
              545.Jump to Node 424

              Metadata

              Node Type: JumpUUID: e565ea88-2827-86ec-d705-946e6e4f66adJump Target: Node 424 (b47d6da9-3fd6-4e8c-c277-f40daeb6dda3)Jump Target Point: 1
            • +
              201.Player: I'd rather not talk about it right now. It's a lot to process.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 56af7dde-2792-f36f-fa9a-4bbb6db8fa2cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h390f286dg25f6g475dg8e81g3792934e0229Text UUID: 90460497-569c-4fd9-8b48-c01d77a12f09Show Once: True
              • •
                106.Origin_Intro_Karlach: All right, soldier. But look, if you're in a fix that can be solved by fire or fists, just point me in the right direction. I mean it. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ed79685-f499-39e3-a401-2fcdea690112Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb879887fge9a6g44f2g9ae7g5f4848282ee4Text UUID: cd3219a6-8290-481d-a1b0-1c08bd33adf9Timeline Phase Index: 308Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2ed79685-f499-39e3-a401-2fcdea690112Timeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
        • +
          326.Player: I wouldn't exactly say that.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8f93cb77-aa57-dfd1-944f-e0594d80d71fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8a50465fgeaa9g42beg9361g198403eb4882Text UUID: 34a2bd3b-23c4-4b73-9fd3-23da4910905aShow Once: True
          • See Node 104 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Oh? What did he say?
    • +
      63.Player: Yes it was. Good old Grandfather Dekarios, come to check in on his doting grandson.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1ea6da42-b401-1bd7-5c8e-7af464d27267Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc4b2188aga173g4cebg90b9gaf99460a08e8Text UUID: 490cac1c-5cb5-459d-846e-bccd0c4a6f5cShow Once: True
      • +
        563.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Lovely! You should've introduced him around. Elders love me, and I love them.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ebb82a49-e3f7-8a57-d7e7-6e59d7603031Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hc844822bgc93eg401fg9b87g49e5fb1ec8eaText UUID: b01d6b4a-1763-4afd-956b-13993930ceeaTimeline Phase Index: 215Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ebb82a49-e3f7-8a57-d7e7-6e59d7603031Timeline Phase Duration: 9.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          232.Player: I'm joking, Karlach. That was Elminster Aumar, the Sage of Shadowdale, one of the greatest wizards to ever live?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 653fdaa2-9db6-deec-70ab-078ebc08ae44Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h92d75094g8c14g438ega9fage03ee01975ebText UUID: 178d7638-2b0b-4cfc-bb62-3f474d248b27Show Once: True
          • See Node 599 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Huh. Doesn't ring a bell. But all right! Must've had something important to say, if he came all this way. Good news, I hope.
        • +
          331.Player: Elminster's no ordinary elder. He's the most renowned wizard in the realms.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 91430650-c5ac-8635-ed35-4fcbf32b4174Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfdc384feg706dg4250gb05cgeb3a30272483Text UUID: 29526f8b-543b-4aed-9723-bc21dbe9df74Show Once: True
          • +
            296.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Your grandfather is the most famous wizard in the realms?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 843cf6c9-894c-8912-152e-c8c33a4aa768Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h007af92dg9cd7g4250g87e5gac713dab25d1Text UUID: f9415db6-5e1c-474f-b127-ea1b44bee7e7Timeline Phase Index: 296Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 843cf6c9-894c-8912-152e-c8c33a4aa768Timeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 843cf6c9-894c-8912-152e-c8c33a4aa768Group Index: 0
            • +
              209.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I should've guessed. I mean, you're pretty powerful. Makes sense that it's in your blood.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5887c558-fd0b-74e9-74a3-9051e4ceea8fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf2fd86b1gaac8g4cfcg96d3g762ce654c0c8Text UUID: 21f6e3a4-59e3-4ddc-a433-ba8d6b66fb08Group ID: 843cf6c9-894c-8912-152e-c8c33a4aa768Group Index: 1
              • +
                279.Player: No, Karlach - I was joking before. Elminster isn't my grandfather. But he did tell me something quite serious.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7abb4b11-091d-a4ea-22ef-cbf45273890dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3ede7a22gf7f0g4580g805cg8d475151afcaText UUID: ce423fb2-711c-479c-8fda-ea022c6c6b1dShow Once: True
                • +
                  168.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm listening. What did he say?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c483d4a-6484-8264-c45b-0cbaa264857fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h87331741g0750g413ag8bd4ga61f3476ca94Text UUID: 565f84be-256c-4aed-ae67-cd1e6cfb8ee4Timeline Phase Index: 259Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4c483d4a-6484-8264-c45b-0cbaa264857fTimeline Phase Duration: 4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

    118.Origin_Intro_Karlach: That bloody freak won't get away with this. We're going to hunt her down and take Yenna back. Mark my words.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Yenna!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Yenna

    364.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Do you feel that? I've never felt so cold. And that's me. This place will swallow us whole if we let it. Stick close to Mama K.TG_SCL_EnteredShadowLands!TG_SCL_EnteredShadowLands

    202.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Not in the habit of arguing with gods, but I'm not sure what to do. Whatever might be 'corrupted' about the Prism, it's helped us thus far.TG_CRE_PlanecasterActivated!TG_CRE_PlanecasterActivated

    547.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well done getting the wizard on board. He can zap from afar while I smack up close. But if he tries to get me to read any tomes, I will scream.TG_ORI_GaleRecruited!TG_ORI_GaleRecruited
